originalText: אָדָם שֵׁת אֱנוֹשׁ׃
englishText: ADAM, SETH, Enosh;
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: קֵינָן מַהֲלַלְאֵל יָרֶד׃
englishText: Kenan, Mahalalel, Jared;
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: חֲנוֹךְ מְתוּשֶׁלַח לָמֶךְ׃
englishText: Enoch, Methuselah, Lamech;
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: נֹחַ שֵׁם חָם וָיָפֶת׃
englishText: Noah, Shem, Ham, and Japheth.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: בְּנֵי יֶפֶת גֹּמֶר וּמָגוֹג וּמָדַי וְיָוָן וְתֻבָל וּמֶשֶׁךְ וְתִירָס׃
englishText: The sons of Japheth: Gomer, and Magog, and Madai, and Javan, and Tubal, and Meshech, and Tiras.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וּבְנֵי גֹּמֶר אַשְׁכֲּנַז וְדִיפַת וְתוֹגַרְמָה׃
englishText: And the sons of Gomer: Ashkenaz, and Diphath, and Togarmah.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וּבְנֵי יָוָן אֱלִישָׁה וְתַרְשִׁישָׁה כִּתִּים וְרוֹדָנִים׃
englishText: And the sons of Javan: Elishah, and Tarshish, Kittim, and Rodanim.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: בְּנֵי חָם כּוּשׁ וּמִצְרַיִם פּוּט וּכְנָעַן׃
englishText: The sons of Ham: Cush, and Mizraim, Put, and Canaan.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וּבְנֵי כוּשׁ סְבָא וַחֲוִילָה וְסַבְתָּא וְרַעְמָא וְסַבְתְּכָא וּבְנֵי רַעְמָא שְׁבָא וּדְדָן׃
englishText: And the sons of Cush: Seba, and Havilah, and Sabta, and Raama, and Sabteca. And the sons of Raama: Sheba, and Dedan.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וְכוּשׁ יָלַד אֶת־נִמְרוֹד הוּא הֵחֵל לִהְיוֹת גִּבּוֹר בָּאָרֶץ׃
englishText: And Cush begot Nimrod; he began to be a mighty one in the earth.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וּמִצְרַיִם יָלַד אֶת־לודיים [לוּדִים] וְאֶת־עֲנָמִים וְאֶת־לְהָבִים וְאֶת־נַפְתֻּחִים׃
englishText: And Mizraim begot Ludim, and Anamim, and Lehabim, and Naphtuhim,
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וְאֶת־פַּתְרֻסִים וְאֶת־כַּסְלֻחִים אֲשֶׁר יָצְאוּ מִשָּׁם פְּלִשְׁתִּים וְאֶת־כַּפְתֹּרִים׃
englishText: and Pathrusim, and Casluhim—from whence came the Philistines—and Caphtorim.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וּכְנַעַן יָלַד אֶת־צִידוֹן בְּכֹרוֹ וְאֶת־חֵת׃
englishText: And Canaan begot Zidon his first-born, and Heth;
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וְאֶת־הַיְבוּסִי וְאֶת־הָאֱמֹרִי וְאֵת הַגִּרְגָּשִׁי׃
englishText: and the Jebusite, and the Amorite, and the Girgashite;
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וְאֶת־הַחִוִּי וְאֶת־הַעַרְקִי וְאֶת־הַסִּינִי׃
englishText: and the Hivite, and the Arkite, and the Sinite;
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וְאֶת־הָאַרְוָדִי וְאֶת־הַצְּמָרִי וְאֶת־הַחֲמָתִי׃
englishText: and the Arvadite, and the Zemarite, and the Hamathite.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: בְּנֵי שֵׁם עֵילָם וְאַשּׁוּר וְאַרְפַּכְשַׁד וְלוּד וַאֲרָם וְעוּץ וְחוּל וְגֶתֶר וָמֶשֶׁךְ׃
englishText: The Sons of Shem: Elam, and Asshur, and Arpachshad, and Lud, and Aram, and Uz, and Hul, and Gether, and Meshech.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וְאַרְפַּכְשַׁד יָלַד אֶת־שָׁלַח וְשֶׁלַח יָלַד אֶת־עֵבֶר׃
englishText: And Arpachshad begot Shelah, and Shelah begot Eber.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וּלְעֵבֶר יֻלַּד שְׁנֵי בָנִים שֵׁם הָאֶחָד פֶּלֶג כִּי בְיָמָיו נִפְלְגָה הָאָרֶץ וְשֵׁם אָחִיו יָקְטָן׃
englishText: And unto Eber were born two sons: the name of the one was Peleg; for in his days the earth was divided; and his brother’s name was Joktan.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וְיָקְטָן יָלַד אֶת־אַלְמוֹדָד וְאֶת־שָׁלֶף וְאֶת־חֲצַרְמָוֶת וְאֶת־יָרַח׃
englishText: And Joktan begot Almodad, and Sheleph, and Hazarmaveth, and Jerah;
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וְאֶת־הֲדוֹרָם וְאֶת־אוּזָל וְאֶת־דִּקְלָה׃
englishText: and Hadoram, and Uzal, and Diklah;
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וְאֶת־עֵיבָל וְאֶת־אֲבִימָאֵל וְאֶת־שְׁבָא׃
englishText: and Ebal, and Abimael, and Sheba;
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וְאֶת־אוֹפִיר וְאֶת־חֲוִילָה וְאֶת־יוֹבָב כָּל־אֵלֶּה בְּנֵי יָקְטָן׃
englishText: and Ophir, and Havilah, and Jobab. All these were the sons of Joktan.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: שֵׁם אַרְפַּכְשַׁד שָׁלַח׃
englishText: Shem, Arpachshad, Shelah;
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: עֵבֶר פֶּלֶג רְעוּ׃
englishText: Eber, Peleg, Reu;
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: שְׂרוּג נָחוֹר תָּרַח׃
englishText: Serug, Nahor, Terah;
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: אַבְרָם הוּא אַבְרָהָם׃
englishText: Abram—the same is Abraham.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: בְּנֵי אַבְרָהָם יִצְחָק וְיִשְׁמָעֵאל׃
englishText: The sons of Abraham: Isaac, and Ishmael.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: אֵלֶּה תֹּלְדוֹתָם בְּכוֹר יִשְׁמָעֵאל נְבָיוֹת וְקֵדָר וְאַדְבְּאֵל וּמִבְשָׂם׃
englishText: These are their generations: the first-born of Ishmael, Nebaioth; then Kedar, and Adbeel, and Mibsam,
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: מִשְׁמָע וְדוּמָה מַשָּׂא חֲדַד וְתֵימָא׃
englishText: Mishma, and Dumah, Massa, Hadad, and Tema,
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: יְטוּר נָפִישׁ וָקֵדְמָה אֵלֶּה הֵם בְּנֵי יִשְׁמָעֵאל׃
englishText: Jetur, Naphish, and Kedem. These are the sons of Ishmael.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וּבְנֵי קְטוּרָה פִּילֶגֶשׁ אַבְרָהָם יָלְדָה אֶת־זִמְרָן וְיָקְשָׁן וּמְדָן וּמִדְיָן וְיִשְׁבָּק וְשׁוּחַ וּבְנֵי יָקְשָׁן שְׁבָא וּדְדָן׃
englishText: And the sons of Keturah, Abraham’s concubine: she bore Zimran, and Jokshan, and Medan, and Midian, and Ishbak, and Shuah. And the sons of Jokshan: Sheba, and Dedan.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וּבְנֵי מִדְיָן עֵיפָה וָעֵפֶר וַחֲנוֹךְ וַאֲבִידָע וְאֶלְדָּעָה כָּל־אֵלֶּה בְּנֵי קְטוּרָה׃
englishText: And the sons of Midian: Ephah, and Epher, and Hanoch, and Abida, and Eldaah. All these were the sons of Keturah.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וַיּוֹלֶד אַבְרָהָם אֶת־יִצְחָק בְּנֵי יִצְחָק עֵשָׂו וְיִשְׂרָאֵל׃
englishText: And Abraham begot Isaac. The sons of Isaac: Esau, and Israel.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: בְּנֵי עֵשָׂו אֱלִיפַז רְעוּאֵל וִיעוּשׁ וְיַעְלָם וְקֹרַח׃
englishText: The sons of Esau: Eliphaz, Reuel, and Jeush, and Jalam and Korah.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: בְּנֵי אֱלִיפָז תֵּימָן וְאוֹמָר צְפִי וְגַעְתָּם קְנַז וְתִמְנָע וַעֲמָלֵק׃
englishText: The sons of Eliphaz: Teman, and Omar, Zephi, and Gatam, Kenaz, and Timna, and Amalek.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: בְּנֵי רְעוּאֵל נַחַת זֶרַח שַׁמָּה וּמִזָּה׃
englishText: The sons of Reuel: Nahath, Zerah, Shammah, and Mizzah.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וּבְנֵי שֵׂעִיר לוֹטָן וְשׁוֹבָל וְצִבְעוֹן וַעֲנָה וְדִישֹׁן וְאֵצֶר וְדִישָׁן׃
englishText: And the sons of Seir: Lotan, and Shobal, and Zibeon, and Anah, and Dishon, and Ezer, and Dishan.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וּבְנֵי לוֹטָן חֹרִי וְהוֹמָם וַאֲחוֹת לוֹטָן תִּמְנָע׃
englishText: And the sons of Lotan: Hori, and Homam; and Timna was Lotan’s sister.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: בְּנֵי שׁוֹבָל עַלְיָן וּמָנַחַת וְעֵיבָל שְׁפִי וְאוֹנָם וּבְנֵי צִבְעוֹן אַיָּה וַעֲנָה׃
englishText: The sons of Shobal: Alian, and Manahath, and Ebal, Shephi, and Onam. And the sons of Zibeon: Aiah, and Anah.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: בְּנֵי עֲנָה דִּישׁוֹן וּבְנֵי דִישׁוֹן חַמְרָן וְאֶשְׁבָּן וְיִתְרָן וּכְרָן׃
englishText: The sons of Anah: Dishon. And the sons of Dishon: Hamran, and Eshban, and Ithran, and Cheran.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: בְּנֵי־אֵצֶר בִּלְהָן וְזַעֲוָן יַעֲקָן בְּנֵי דִישׁוֹן עוּץ וַאֲרָן׃
englishText: The sons of Ezer: Bilhan, and Zaavan, Jaakan. The sons of Dishan: Uz, and Aran.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וְאֵלֶּה הַמְּלָכִים אֲשֶׁר מָלְכוּ בְּאֶרֶץ אֱדוֹם לִפְנֵי מְלָךְ־מֶלֶךְ לִבְנֵי יִשְׂרָאֵל בֶּלַע בֶּן־בְּעוֹר וְשֵׁם עִירוֹ דִּנְהָבָה׃
englishText: Now these are the kings that reigned in the land of Edom, before their reigned any king over the children of Israel: Bela the son of Beor; and the name of his city was Dinhabah.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וַיָּמָת בָּלַע וַיִּמְלֹךְ תַּחְתָּיו יוֹבָב בֶּן־זֶרַח מִבָּצְרָה׃
englishText: And Bela died, and Jobab the son of Zerah of Bozrah reigned in his stead.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וַיָּמָת יוֹבָב וַיִּמְלֹךְ תַּחְתָּיו חוּשָׁם מֵאֶרֶץ הַתֵּימָנִי׃
englishText: And Jobab died, and Husham of the land of the Temanites reigned in his stead.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וַיָּמָת חוּשָׁם וַיִּמְלֹךְ תַּחְתָּיו הֲדַד בֶּן־בְּדַד הַמַּכֶּה אֶת־מִדְיָן בִּשְׂדֵה מוֹאָב וְשֵׁם עִירוֹ עיות [עֲוִית׃]
englishText: And Husham died, and Hadad the son of Bedad, who smote Midian in the field of Moab, reigned in his stead; and the name of his city was Avith.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וַיָּמָת הֲדָד וַיִּמְלֹךְ תַּחְתָּיו שַׂמְלָה מִמַּשְׂרֵקָה׃
englishText: And Hadad died, and Samlah of Masrekah reigned in his stead.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וַיָּמָת שַׂמְלָה וַיִּמְלֹךְ תַּחְתָּיו שָׁאוּל מֵרְחֹבוֹת הַנָּהָר׃
englishText: And Samlah died, and Shaul of Rehoboth by the River reigned in his stead.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וַיָּמָת שָׁאוּל וַיִּמְלֹךְ תַּחְתָּיו בַּעַל חָנָן בֶּן־עַכְבּוֹר׃
englishText: And Shaul died, and Baal-hanan the son of Achbor reigned in his stead.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וַיָּמָת בַּעַל חָנָן וַיִּמְלֹךְ תַּחְתָּיו הֲדַד וְשֵׁם עִירוֹ פָּעִי וְשֵׁם אִשְׁתּוֹ מְהֵיטַבְאֵל בַּת־מַטְרֵד בַּת מֵי זָהָב׃
englishText: And Baal-hanan died, and Hadad reigned in his stead; and the name of his city was Pai; and his wife’s name was Mehetabel, the daughter of Matred, the daughter of Mezahab.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וַיָּמָת הֲדָד וַיִּהְיוּ אַלּוּפֵי אֱדוֹם אַלּוּף תִּמְנָע אַלּוּף עליה [עַלְוָה] אַלּוּף יְתֵת׃
englishText: And Hadad died. And the chiefs of Edom were: the chief of Timna, the chief of Alvah, the chief of Jetheth;
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: אַלּוּף אָהֳלִיבָמָה אַלּוּף אֵלָה אַלּוּף פִּינֹן׃
englishText: the chief of Oholibamah, the chief of Elah, the chief of Pinon;
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: אַלּוּף קְנַז אַלּוּף תֵּימָן אַלּוּף מִבְצָר׃
englishText: the chief of Kenaz, the chief of Teman, the chief of Mibzar;
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: אַלּוּף מַגְדִּיאֵל אַלּוּף עִירָם אֵלֶּה אַלּוּפֵי אֱדוֹם׃
englishText: the chief of Magdiel, the chief of Iram. These are the chiefs of Edom.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: אֵלֶּה בְּנֵי יִשְׂרָאֵל רְאוּבֵן שִׁמְעוֹן לֵוִי וִיהוּדָה יִשָׂשכָר וּזְבֻלוּן׃
englishText: These are the sons of Israel: Reuben, Simeon, Levi, and Judah, Issachar, and Zebulun;
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: דָּן יוֹסֵף וּבִנְיָמִן נַפְתָּלִי גָּד וְאָשֵׁר׃
englishText: Dan, Joseph, and Benjamin, Naphtali, Gad, and Asher.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: בְּנֵי יְהוּדָה עֵר וְאוֹנָן וְשֵׁלָה שְׁלוֹשָׁה נוֹלַד לוֹ מִבַּת־שׁוּעַ הַכְּנַעֲנִית וַיְהִי עֵר בְּכוֹר יְהוּדָה רַע בְּעֵינֵי יְהוָה וַיְמִיתֵהוּ׃
englishText: The sons of Judah: Er, and Onan, and Shelah; which three were born unto him of Bath-shua the Canaanitess. And Er, Judah’s first-born, was wicked in the sight of the LORD; and He slew him.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וְתָמָר כַּלָּתוֹ יָלְדָה לּוֹ אֶת־פֶּרֶץ וְאֶת־זָרַח כָּל־בְּנֵי יְהוּדָה חֲמִשָּׁה׃
englishText: And Tamar his daughter-in-law bore him Perez and Zerah. All the sons of Judah were five.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: בְּנֵי־פֶרֶץ חֶצְרוֹן וְחָמוּל׃
englishText: The sons of Perez: Hezron, and Hamul.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וּבְנֵי זֶרַח זִמְרִי וְאֵיתָן וְהֵימָן וְכַלְכֹּל וָדָרַע כֻּלָּם חֲמִשָּׁה׃
englishText: And the sons of Zerah: Zimri, and Ethan, and Heman, and Calcol, and Dara: five of them in all.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וּבְנֵי כַּרְמִי עָכָר עוֹכֵר יִשְׂרָאֵל אֲשֶׁר מָעַל בַּחֵרֶם׃
englishText: And the sons of Carmi: Achar, the troubler of Israel, who committed a trespass concerning the devoted thing.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וּבְנֵי אֵיתָן עֲזַרְיָה׃
englishText: And the sons of Ethan: Azariah.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וּבְנֵי חֶצְרוֹן אֲשֶׁר נוֹלַד־לוֹ אֶת־יְרַחְמְאֵל וְאֶת־רָם וְאֶת־כְּלוּבָי׃
englishText: The sons also of Hezron, that were born unto him: Jerahmeel, and Ram, and Chelubai.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וְרָם הוֹלִיד אֶת־עַמִּינָדָב וְעַמִּינָדָב הוֹלִיד אֶת־נַחְשׁוֹן נְשִׂיא בְּנֵי יְהוּדָה׃
englishText: And Ram begot Amminadab; and Amminadab begot Nahshon, prince of the children of Judah;
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וְנַחְשׁוֹן הוֹלִיד אֶת־שַׂלְמָא וְשַׂלְמָא הוֹלִיד אֶת־בֹּעַז׃
englishText: and Nahshon begot Salma, and Salma begot Boaz;
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וּבֹעַז הוֹלִיד אֶת־עוֹבֵד וְעוֹבֵד הוֹלִיד אֶת־יִשָׁי׃
englishText: and Boaz begot Obed, and Obed begot Jesse;
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וְאִישַׁי הוֹלִיד אֶת־בְּכֹרוֹ אֶת־אֱלִיאָב וַאֲבִינָדָב הַשֵּׁנִי וְשִׁמְעָא הַשְּׁלִישִׁי׃
englishText: and Jesse begot his first-born Eliab, and Abinadab the second, and Shimea the third;
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: נְתַנְאֵל הָרְבִיעִי רַדַּי הַחֲמִישִׁי׃
englishText: Nethanel the fourth, Raddai the fifth;
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: אֹצֶם הַשִּׁשִּׁי דָּוִיד הַשְּׁבִעִי׃
englishText: Ozem the sixth, David the seventh.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: ואחיתיהם [וְאַחְיוֹתֵיהֶם] צְרוּיָה וַאֲבִיגָיִל וּבְנֵי צְרוּיָה אַבְשַׁי וְיוֹאָב וַעֲשָׂה־אֵל שְׁלֹשָׁה׃
englishText: And their sisters were Zeruiah and Abigail. And the sons of Zeruiah: Abishai, and Joab, and Asahel, three.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וַאֲבִיגַיִל יָלְדָה אֶת־עֲמָשָׂא וַאֲבִי עֲמָשָׂא יֶתֶר הַיִּשְׁמְעֵאלִי׃
englishText: And Abigail bore Amasa; and the father of Amasa was Jether the Ishmaelite.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וְכָלֵב בֶּן־חֶצְרוֹן הוֹלִיד אֶת־עֲזוּבָה אִשָּׁה וְאֶת־יְרִיעוֹת וְאֵלֶּה בָנֶיהָ יֵשֶׁר וְשׁוֹבָב וְאַרְדּוֹן׃
englishText: And Caleb the son of Hezron begot children of Azubah his wife—and of Jerioth—and these were her sons: Jesher, and Shobab, and Ardon.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וַתָּמָת עֲזוּבָה וַיִּקַּח־לוֹ כָלֵב אֶת־אֶפְרָת וַתֵּלֶד לוֹ אֶת־חוּר׃
englishText: And Azubah died, and Caleb took unto him Ephrath, who bore him Hur.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וְחוּר הוֹלִיד אֶת־אוּרִי וְאוּרִי הוֹלִיד אֶת־בְּצַלְאֵל׃
englishText: And Hur begot Uri, and Uri begot Bezalel.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וְאַחַר בָּא חֶצְרוֹן אֶל־בַּת־מָכִיר אֲבִי גִלְעָד וְהוּא לְקָחָהּ וְהוּא בֶּן־שִׁשִּׁים שָׁנָה וַתֵּלֶד לוֹ אֶת־שְׂגוּב׃
englishText: And afterward Hezron went in to the daughter of Machir the father of Gilead; whom he took to wife when he was threescore years old; and she bore him Segub.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וּשְׂגוּב הוֹלִיד אֶת־יָאִיר וַיְהִי־לוֹ עֶשְׂרִים וְשָׁלוֹשׁ עָרִים בְּאֶרֶץ הַגִּלְעָד׃
englishText: And Segub begot Jair, who had three and twenty cities in the land of Gilead.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וַיִּקַּח גְּשׁוּר־וַאֲרָם אֶת־חַוֺּת יָאִיר מֵאִתָּם אֶת־קְנָת וְאֶת־בְּנֹתֶיהָ שִׁשִּׁים עִיר כָּל־אֵלֶּה בְּנֵי מָכִיר אֲבִי־גִלְעָד׃
englishText: And Geshur and Aram took Havvoth-jair from them, with Kenath, and the villages thereof, even threescore cities. All these were the sons of Machir the father of Gilead.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וְאַחַר מוֹת־חֶצְרוֹן בְּכָלֵב אֶפְרָתָה וְאֵשֶׁת חֶצְרוֹן אֲבִיָּה וַתֵּלֶד לוֹ אֶת־אַשְׁחוּר אֲבִי תְקוֹעַ׃
englishText: And after that Hezron was dead in Caleb-ephrath, then Abiah Hezron’s wife bore him Ashhur the father of Tekoa.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וַיִּהְיוּ בְנֵי־יְרַחְמְאֵל בְּכוֹר חֶצְרוֹן הַבְּכוֹר רָם וּבוּנָה וָאֹרֶן וָאֹצֶם אֲחִיָּה׃
englishText: And the sons of Jerahmeel the first-born of Hezron were Ram the first-born, and Bunah, and Oren, and Ozem, Ahijah.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וַתְּהִי אִשָּׁה אַחֶרֶת לִירַחְמְאֵל וּשְׁמָהּ עֲטָרָה הִיא אֵם אוֹנָם׃
englishText: And Jerahmeel had another wife, whose name was Atarah; she was the mother of Onam.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וַיִּהְיוּ בְנֵי־רָם בְּכוֹר יְרַחְמְאֵל מַעַץ וְיָמִין וָעֵקֶר׃
englishText: And the sons of Ram the first-born of Jerahmeel were Maaz, and Jamin, and Eker.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וַיִּהְיוּ בְנֵי־אוֹנָם שַׁמַּי וְיָדָע וּבְנֵי שַׁמַּי נָדָב וַאֲבִישׁוּר׃
englishText: And the sons of Onam were Shammai, and Jada; and the sons of Shammai: Nadab, and Abishur.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וְשֵׁם אֵשֶׁת אֲבִישׁוּר אֲבִיהָיִל וַתֵּלֶד לוֹ אֶת־אַחְבָּן וְאֶת־מוֹלִיד׃
englishText: And the name of the wife of Abishur was Abihail; and she bore him Ahban, and Molid.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וּבְנֵי נָדָב סֶלֶד וְאַפָּיִם וַיָּמָת סֶלֶד לֹא בָנִים׃
englishText: And the sons of Nadab: Seled, and Appaim; but Seled died without children.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וּבְנֵי אַפַּיִם יִשְׁעִי וּבְנֵי יִשְׁעִי שֵׁשָׁן וּבְנֵי שֵׁשָׁן אַחְלָי׃
englishText: And the sons of Appaim: Ishi. And the sons of Ishi: Sheshan. And the sons of Sheshan: Ahlai.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וּבְנֵי יָדָע אֲחִי שַׁמַּי יֶתֶר וְיוֹנָתָן וַיָּמָת יֶתֶר לֹא בָנִים׃
englishText: And the sons of Jada the brother of Shammai: Jether, and Jonathan: and Jether died without children.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וּבְנֵי יוֹנָתָן פֶּלֶת וְזָזָא אֵלֶּה הָיוּ בְּנֵי יְרַחְמְאֵל׃
englishText: And the sons of Jonathan: Peleth, and Zaza. These were the sons of Jerahmeel.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וְלֹא־הָיָה לְשֵׁשָׁן בָּנִים כִּי אִם־בָּנוֹת וּלְשֵׁשָׁן עֶבֶד מִצְרִי וּשְׁמוֹ יַרְחָע׃
englishText: Now Sheshan had no sons, but daughters. And Sheshan had a servant, an Egyptian, whose name was Jarha.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וַיִּתֵּן שֵׁשָׁן אֶת־בִּתּוֹ לְיַרְחָע עַבְדּוֹ לְאִשָּׁה וַתֵּלֶד לוֹ אֶת־עַתָּי׃
englishText: So Sheshan gave his daughter to Jarha his servant to wife; and she bore him Attai.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וְעַתַּי הֹלִיד אֶת־נָתָן וְנָתָן הוֹלִיד אֶת־זָבָד׃
englishText: And Attai begot Nathan, and Nathan begot Zabad;
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וְזָבָד הוֹלִיד אֶת־אֶפְלָל וְאֶפְלָל הוֹלִיד אֶת־עוֹבֵד׃
englishText: and Zabad begot Ephlal, and Ephlal begot Obed;
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וְעוֹבֵד הוֹלִיד אֶת־יֵהוּא וְיֵהוּא הוֹלִיד אֶת־עֲזַרְיָה׃
englishText: and Obed begot Jehu, and Jehu begot Azariah;
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וַעֲזַרְיָה הֹלִיד אֶת־חָלֶץ וְחֶלֶץ הֹלִיד אֶת־אֶלְעָשָׂה׃
englishText: and Azariah begot Helez, and Helez begot Eleasah;
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וְאֶלְעָשָׂה הֹלִיד אֶת־סִסְמָי וְסִסְמַי הֹלִיד אֶת־שַׁלּוּם׃
englishText: and Eleasah begot Sisamai, and Sisamai begot Shallum;
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וְשַׁלּוּם הוֹלִיד אֶת־יְקַמְיָה וִיקַמְיָה הֹלִיד אֶת־אֱלִישָׁמָע׃
englishText: and Shallum begot Jekamiah, and Jekamiah begot Elishama.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וּבְנֵי כָלֵב אֲחִי יְרַחְמְאֵל מֵישָׁע בְּכֹרוֹ הוּא אֲבִי־זִיף וּבְנֵי מָרֵשָׁה אֲבִי חֶבְרוֹן׃
englishText: And the sons of Caleb the brother of Jerahmeel were Mesha his first-born, who was the father of Ziph, and the sons of Mareshah the father of Hebron.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וּבְנֵי חֶבְרוֹן קֹרַח וְתַפֻּחַ וְרֶקֶם וָשָׁמַע׃
englishText: And the sons of Hebron: Korah, and Tappuah, and Rekem, and Shema.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וְשֶׁמַע הוֹלִיד אֶת־רַחַם אֲבִי יָרְקֳעָם וְרֶקֶם הוֹלִיד אֶת־שַׁמָּי׃
englishText: And Shema begot Raham, the father of Jorkeam; and Rekem begot Shammai.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וּבֶן־שַׁמַּי מָעוֹן וּמָעוֹן אֲבִי בֵית־צוּר׃
englishText: And the son of Shammai was Maon; and Maon was the father of Beth-zur.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וְעֵיפָה פִּילֶגֶשׁ כָּלֵב יָלְדָה אֶת־חָרָן וְאֶת־מוֹצָא וְאֶת־גָּזֵז וְחָרָן הֹלִיד אֶת־גָּזֵז׃
englishText: And Ephah, Caleb’s concubine, bore Haran, and Moza, and Gazez; and Haran begot Gazez.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וּבְנֵי יָהְדָּי רֶגֶם וְיוֹתָם וְגֵישָׁן וָפֶלֶט וְעֵיפָה וָשָׁעַף׃
englishText: And the sons of Jahdai: Regem, and Jotham, and Geshan, and Pelet, and Ephah, and Shaaph.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: פִּלֶגֶשׁ כָּלֵב מַעֲכָה יָלַד שֶׁבֶר וְאֶת־תִּרְחֲנָה׃
englishText: Maacah, Caleb’s concubine, bore Sheber and Tirhanah.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וַתֵּלֶד שַׁעַף אֲבִי מַדְמַנָּה אֶת־שְׁוָא אֲבִי מַכְבֵּנָה וַאֲבִי גִבְעָא וּבַת־כָּלֵב עַכְסָה׃
englishText: And [the wife of] Shaaph the father of Madmannah bore Sheva the father of Machbenah and the father of Gibea. And the daughter of Caleb was Achsah.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: אֵלֶּה הָיוּ בְּנֵי כָלֵב בֶּן־חוּר בְּכוֹר אֶפְרָתָה שׁוֹבָל אֲבִי קִרְיַת יְעָרִים׃
englishText: These were the sons of Caleb. The sons of Hur the first-born of Ephrath: Shobal the father of Kiriath-jearim;
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: שַׂלְמָא אֲבִי בֵית־לָחֶם חָרֵף אֲבִי בֵית־גָּדֵר׃
englishText: Salma the father of Beth-lehem, Hareph the father of Beth-gader.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וַיִּהְיוּ בָנִים לְשׁוֹבָל אֲבִי קִרְיַת יְעָרִים הָרֹאֶה חֲצִי הַמְּנֻחוֹת׃
englishText: And Shobal the father of Kiriath-jearim had sons: Haroeh, and half of the Menuhoth.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וּמִשְׁפְּחוֹת קִרְיַת יְעָרִים הַיִּתְרִי וְהַפּוּתִי וְהַשֻּׁמָתִי וְהַמִּשְׁרָעִי מֵאֵלֶּה יָצְאוּ הַצָּרְעָתִי וְהָאֶשְׁתָּאֻלִי׃
englishText: And the families of Kiriath-jearim: the Ithrites, and the Puthites, and the Shumathites, and the Mishraites; of them came the Zorathites, and the Eshtaolites.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: בְּנֵי שַׂלְמָא בֵּית לֶחֶם וּנְטוֹפָתִי עַטְרוֹת בֵּית יוֹאָב וַחֲצִי הַמָּנַחְתִּי הַצָּרְעִי׃
englishText: The sons of Salma: Beth-lehem, and the Netophathites, Atroth-beth-joab, and half of the Manahathites, the Zorites.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וּמִשְׁפְּחוֹת סֹפְרִים ישבו [יֹשְׁבֵי] יַעְבֵּץ תִּרְעָתִים שִׁמְעָתִים שׂוּכָתִים הֵמָּה הַקִּינִים הַבָּאִים מֵחַמַּת אֲבִי בֵית־רֵכָב׃
englishText: And the families of scribes that dwelt at Jabez: the Tirathites, the Shimeathites, the Sucathites. These are the Kenites that came of Hammath, the father of the house of Rechab.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וְאֵלֶּה הָיוּ בְּנֵי דָויִד אֲשֶׁר נוֹלַד־לוֹ בְּחֶבְרוֹן הַבְּכוֹר אַמְנֹן לַאֲחִינֹעַם הַיִּזְרְעֵאלִית שֵׁנִי דָּנִיֵּאל לַאֲבִיגַיִל הַכַּרְמְלִית׃
englishText: Now these were the sons of David, that were born unto him in Hebron: the first-born, Amnon, of Ahinoam the Jezreelitess; the second, Daniel, of Abigail the Carmelitess;
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: הַשְּׁלִשִׁי לְאַבְשָׁלוֹם בֶּן־מַעֲכָה בַּת־תַּלְמַי מֶלֶךְ גְּשׁוּר הָרְבִיעִי אֲדֹנִיָּה בֶן־חַגִּית׃
englishText: the third, Absalom the son of Maacah the daughter of Talmai king of Geshur; the fourth, Adonijah the son of Haggith;
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: הַחֲמִישִׁי שְׁפַטְיָה לַאֲבִיטָל הַשִּׁשִּׁי יִתְרְעָם לְעֶגְלָה אִשְׁתּוֹ׃
englishText: the fifth, Shephatiah of Abital; the sixth, Ithream by Eglah his wife.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: שִׁשָּׁה נוֹלַד־לוֹ בְחֶבְרוֹן וַיִּמְלָךְ־שָׁם שֶׁבַע שָׁנִים וְשִׁשָּׁה חֳדָשִׁים וּשְׁלֹשִׁים וְשָׁלוֹשׁ שָׁנָה מָלַךְ בִּירוּשָׁלִָם׃
englishText: Six were born unto him in Hebron; and there he reigned seven years and six months; and in Jerusalem he reigned thirty and three years.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וְאֵלֶּה נוּלְּדוּ־לוֹ בִּירוּשָׁלָיִם שִׁמְעָא וְשׁוֹבָב וְנָתָן וּשְׁלֹמֹה אַרְבָּעָה לְבַת־שׁוּעַ בַּת־עַמִּיאֵל׃
englishText: And these were born unto him in Jerusalem: Shimea, and Shobab, and Nathan, and Solomon, four, of Bath-shua the daughter of Ammiel;
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וְיִבְחָר וֶאֱלִישָׁמָע וֶאֱלִיפָלֶט׃
englishText: and Ibhar, and Elishama, and Eliphelet;
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וְנֹגַהּ וְנֶפֶג וְיָפִיעַ׃
englishText: and Nogah, and Nepheg, and Japhia;
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וֶאֱלִישָׁמָע וְאֶלְיָדָע וֶאֱלִיפֶלֶט תִּשְׁעָה׃
englishText: and Elishama, and Eliada, and Eliphelet, nine.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: כֹּל בְּנֵי דָוִיד מִלְּבַד בְּנֵי־פִילַגְשִׁים וְתָמָר אֲחוֹתָם׃
englishText: All these were the sons of David, beside the sons of the concubines; and Tamar was their sister.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וּבֶן־שְׁלֹמֹה רְחַבְעָם אֲבִיָּה בְנוֹ אָסָא בְנוֹ יְהוֹשָׁפָט בְּנוֹ׃
englishText: And Solomon’s son was Rehoboam; Abijah his son, Asa his son, Jehoshaphat his son;
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: יוֹרָם בְּנוֹ אֲחַזְיָהוּ בְנוֹ יוֹאָשׁ בְּנוֹ׃
englishText: Joram his son, Ahaziah his son, Joash his son;
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: אֲמַצְיָהוּ בְנוֹ עֲזַרְיָה בְנוֹ יוֹתָם בְּנוֹ׃
englishText: Amaziah his son, Azariah his son, Jotham his son;
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: אָחָז בְּנוֹ חִזְקִיָּהוּ בְנוֹ מְנַשֶּׁה בְנוֹ׃
englishText: Ahaz his son, Hezekiah his son, Manasseh his son;
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: אָמוֹן בְּנוֹ יֹאשִׁיָּהוּ בְנוֹ׃
englishText: Amon his son, Josiah his son.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וּבְנֵי יֹאשִׁיָּהוּ הַבְּכוֹר יוֹחָנָן הַשֵּׁנִי יְהוֹיָקִים הַשְּׁלִשִׁי צִדְקִיָּהוּ הָרְבִיעִי שַׁלּוּם׃
englishText: And the sons of Josiah: the firstborn Johanan, the second Jehoiakim, the third Zedekiah, the fourth Shallum. .
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וּבְנֵי יְהוֹיָקִים יְכָנְיָה בְנוֹ צִדְקִיָּה בְנוֹ׃
englishText: And the sons of Jehoiakim: Jeconiah his son, Zedekiah his son.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וּבְנֵי יְכָנְיָה אַסִּר שְׁאַלְתִּיאֵל בְּנוֹ׃
englishText: And the sons of Jeconiah—the same is Assir—Shealtiel his son;
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וּמַלְכִּירָם וּפְדָיָה וְשֶׁנְאַצַּר יְקַמְיָה הוֹשָׁמָע וּנְדַבְיָה׃
englishText: and Malchiram, and Pedaiah, and Shenazzar, Jekamiah, Hoshama, and Nedabiah.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וּבְנֵי פְדָיָה זְרֻבָּבֶל וְשִׁמְעִי וּבֶן־זְרֻבָּבֶל מְשֻׁלָּם וַחֲנַנְיָה וּשְׁלֹמִית אֲחוֹתָם׃
englishText: And the sons of Pedaiah: Zerubbabel, and Shimei. And the sons of Zerubbabel: Meshullam, and Hananiah; and Shelomith was their sister;
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וַחֲשֻׁבָה וָאֹהֶל וּבֶרֶכְיָה וַחֲסַדְיָה יוּשַׁב חֶסֶד חָמֵשׁ׃
englishText: and Hashubah and Ohel, and Berechiah, and Hasadiah, Jushabhesed, five.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וּבֶן־חֲנַנְיָה פְּלַטְיָה וִישַׁעְיָה בְּנֵי רְפָיָה בְּנֵי אַרְנָן בְּנֵי עֹבַדְיָה בְּנֵי שְׁכַנְיָה׃
englishText: And the sons of Hananiah: Pelatiah, and Jeshaiah; the sons of [Jeshaiah]: Rephaiah; the sons of [Rephaiah]: Arnan; the sons of [Arnan]: Obadiah; the sons of [Obadiah]: Shecaniah.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וּבְנֵי שְׁכַנְיָה שְׁמַעְיָה וּבְנֵי שְׁמַעְיָה חַטּוּשׁ וְיִגְאָל וּבָרִיחַ וּנְעַרְיָה וְשָׁפָט שִׁשָּׁה׃
englishText: And the sons of Shecaniah: Shemaiah; and the sons of Shemaiah: Hattush, and Igal, and Bariah, and Neariah, and Shaphat, six.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וּבֶן־נְעַרְיָה אֶלְיוֹעֵינַי וְחִזְקִיָּה וְעַזְרִיקָם שְׁלֹשָׁה׃
englishText: And the sons of Neariah: Elioenai, and Hizkiah, and Azrikam, three.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וּבְנֵי אֶלְיוֹעֵינַי הדיוהו [הוֹדַוְיָהוּ] וְאֶלְיָשִׁיב וּפְלָיָה וְעַקּוּב וְיוֹחָנָן וּדְלָיָה וַעֲנָנִי שִׁבְעָה׃
englishText: And the sons of Elioenai: Hodaviah, and Eliashib, and Pelaiah, and Akkub, and Johanan, and Delaiah, and Anani, seven.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: בְּנֵי יְהוּדָה פֶּרֶץ חֶצְרוֹן וְכַרְמִי וְחוּר וְשׁוֹבָל׃
englishText: The sons of Judah: Perez, Hezron, and Carmi, and Hur, and Shobal.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וּרְאָיָה בֶן־שׁוֹבָל הוֹלִיד אֶת־יַחַת וְיַחַת הֹלִיד אֶת־אֲחוּמַי וְאֶת־לָהַד אֵלֶּה מִשְׁפְּחוֹת הַצָּרְעָתִי׃
englishText: And Reaiah the son of Shobal begot Jahath; and Jahath begot Ahumai, and Lahad. These are the families of the Zorathites.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וְאֵלֶּה אֲבִי עֵיטָם יִזְרְעֶאל וְיִשְׁמָא וְיִדְבָּשׁ וְשֵׁם אֲחוֹתָם הַצְלֶלְפּוֹנִי׃
englishText: And these were [the sons of] the father of Etam: Jezreel, and Ishma, and Idbash; and the name of their sister was Hazlelponi;
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וּפְנוּאֵל אֲבִי גְדֹר וְעֵזֶר אֲבִי חוּשָׁה אֵלֶּה בְנֵי־חוּר בְּכוֹר אֶפְרָתָה אֲבִי בֵּית לָחֶם׃
englishText: and Penuel the father of Gedor, and Ezer the father of Hushah. These are the sons of Hur the first-born of Ephrath, the father of Beth-lehem.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וּלְאַשְׁחוּר אֲבִי תְקוֹעַ הָיוּ שְׁתֵּי נָשִׁים חֶלְאָה וְנַעֲרָה׃
englishText: And Ashhur the father of Tekoa had two wives, Helah and Naarah.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וַתֵּלֶד לוֹ נַעֲרָה אֶת־אֲחֻזָּם וְאֶת־חֵפֶר וְאֶת־תֵּימְנִי וְאֶת־הָאֲחַשְׁתָּרִי אֵלֶּה בְּנֵי נַעֲרָה׃
englishText: And Naarah bore him Ahuzam, and Hepher, and Timeni, and Ahashtari. These were the sons of Naarah.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וּבְנֵי חֶלְאָה צֶרֶת יצחר [וְצֹחַר] וְאֶתְנָן׃
englishText: And the sons of Helah were Zereth, and Zohar, and Ethnan.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וְקוֹץ הוֹלִיד אֶת־עָנוּב וְאֶת־הַצֹּבֵבָה וּמִשְׁפְּחוֹת אֲחַרְחֵל בֶּן־הָרוּם׃
englishText: And Koz begot Anub, and Zobebah, and the families of Aharhel the son of Harum.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וַיְהִי יַעְבֵּץ נִכְבָּד מֵאֶחָיו וְאִמּוֹ קָרְאָה שְׁמוֹ יַעְבֵּץ לֵאמֹר כִּי יָלַדְתִּי בְּעֹצֶב׃
englishText: And Jabez was more honourable than his brethren; and his mother called his name Jabez, saying: ‘Because I bore him with pain.’
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וַיִּקְרָא יַעְבֵּץ לֵאלֹהֵי יִשְׂרָאֵל לֵאמֹר אִם־בָּרֵךְ תְּבָרֲכֵנִי וְהִרְבִּיתָ אֶת־גְּבוּלִי וְהָיְתָה יָדְךָ עִמִּי וְעָשִׂיתָ מֵּרָעָה לְבִלְתִּי עָצְבִּי וַיָּבֵא אֱלֹהִים אֵת אֲשֶׁר־שָׁאָל׃
englishText: And Jabez called on the God of Israel, saying: ‘Oh that Thou wouldest bless me indeed, and enlarge my border, and that Thy hand might be with me, and that Thou wouldest work deliverance from evil, that it may not pain me! ’ And God granted him that which he requested.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וּכְלוּב אֲחִי־שׁוּחָה הוֹלִיד אֶת־מְחִיר הוּא אֲבִי אֶשְׁתּוֹן׃
englishText: And Chelub the brother of Shuhah begot Mehir, who was the father of Eshton.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וְאֶשְׁתּוֹן הוֹלִיד אֶת־בֵּית רָפָא וְאֶת־פָּסֵחַ וְאֶת־תְּחִנָּה אֲבִי עִיר נָחָשׁ אֵלֶּה אַנְשֵׁי רֵכָה׃
englishText: And Eshton begot Beth-rapha, and Paseah, and Tehinnah the father of Ir-nahash. These are the men of Recah.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וּבְנֵי קְנַז עָתְנִיאֵל וּשְׂרָיָה וּבְנֵי עָתְנִיאֵל חֲתַת׃
englishText: And the sons of Kenaz: Othniel, and Seraiah; and the sons of Othniel: Hathath.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וּמְעוֹנֹתַי הוֹלִיד אֶת־עָפְרָה וּשְׂרָיָה הוֹלִיד אֶת־יוֹאָב אֲבִי גֵּיא חֲרָשִׁים כִּי חֲרָשִׁים הָיוּ׃
englishText: And Meonothai begot Ophrah; and Seraiah begot Joab the father of Ge-harashim; for they were craftsmen.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וּבְנֵי כָּלֵב בֶּן־יְפֻנֶּה עִירוּ אֵלָה וָנָעַם וּבְנֵי אֵלָה וּקְנַז׃
englishText: And the sons of Caleb the son of Jephunneh: Iru, Elah, and Naam; and the sons of Elah: Kenaz.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וּבְנֵי יְהַלֶּלְאֵל זִיף וְזִיפָה תִּירְיָא וַאֲשַׂרְאֵל׃
englishText: And the sons of Jehallelel: Ziph, and Ziphah, Tiria, and Asarel.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וּבֶן־עֶזְרָה יֶתֶר וּמֶרֶד וְעֵפֶר וְיָלוֹן וַתַּהַר אֶת־מִרְיָם וְאֶת־שַׁמַּי וְאֶת־יִשְׁבָּח אֲבִי אֶשְׁתְּמֹעַ׃
englishText: And the sons of Ezrah: Jether, and Mered, and Epher, and Jalon. And she bore Miriam, and Shammai, and Ishbah the father of Eshtemoa—
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וְאִשְׁתּוֹ הַיְהֻדִיָּה יָלְדָה אֶת־יֶרֶד אֲבִי גְדוֹר וְאֶת־חֶבֶר אֲבִי שׂוֹכוֹ וְאֶת־יְקוּתִיאֵל אֲבִי זָנוֹחַ וְאֵלֶּה בְּנֵי בִּתְיָה בַת־פַּרְעֹה אֲשֶׁר לָקַח מָרֶד׃
englishText: and his wife Hajehudijah bore Jered the father of Gedor, and Heber the father of Soco, and Jekuthiel the father of Zanoah—and these are the sons of Bithiah the daughter of Pharaoh whom Mered took.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וּבְנֵי אֵשֶׁת הוֹדִיָּה אֲחוֹת נַחַם אֲבִי קְעִילָה הַגַּרְמִי וְאֶשְׁתְּמֹעַ הַמַּעֲכָתִי׃
englishText: And the sons of the wife of Hodiah, the sister of Naham, were the father of Keilah the Garmite, and Eshtemoa the Maacathite.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וּבְנֵי שִׁימוֹן אַמְנוֹן וְרִנָּה בֶּן־חָנָן ותולון [וְתִילוֹן] וּבְנֵי יִשְׁעִי זוֹחֵת וּבֶן־זוֹחֵת׃
englishText: And the sons of Shimon: Amnon, and Rinnah, Ben-hanan, and Tilon. And the sons of Ishi: Zoheth, and Ben-zoheth.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: בְּנֵי שֵׁלָה בֶן־יְהוּדָה עֵר אֲבִי לֵכָה וְלַעְדָּה אֲבִי מָרֵשָׁה וּמִשְׁפְּחוֹת בֵּית־עֲבֹדַת הַבֻּץ לְבֵית אַשְׁבֵּעַ׃
englishText: The sons of Shelah the son of Judah: Er the father of Lecah, and Ladah the father of Mareshah, and the families of the house of them that wrought fine linen, of the house of Ashbea;
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וְיוֹקִים וְאַנְשֵׁי כֹזֵבָא וְיוֹאָשׁ וְשָׂרָף אֲשֶׁר־בָּעֲלוּ לְמוֹאָב וְיָשֻׁבִי לָחֶם וְהַדְּבָרִים עַתִּיקִים׃
englishText: and Jokim, and the men of Cozeba, and Joash, and Saraph, who had dominion in Moab, and Jashubi-lehem. And the records are ancient.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: הֵמָּה הַיּוֹצְרִים וְיֹשְׁבֵי נְטָעִים וּגְדֵרָה עִם־הַמֶּלֶךְ בִּמְלַאכְתּוֹ יָשְׁבוּ שָׁם׃
englishText: These were the potters, and those that dwelt among plantations and hedges; there they dwelt occupied in the king’s work.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: בְּנֵי שִׁמְעוֹן נְמוּאֵל וְיָמִין יָרִיב זֶרַח שָׁאוּל׃
englishText: The sons of Simeon: Nemuel, and Jamim, Jarib, Zerah, Shaul;
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: שַׁלֻּם בְּנוֹ מִבְשָׂם בְּנוֹ מִשְׁמָע בְּנוֹ׃
englishText: Shallum his son, Mibsam his son, Mishma his son.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וּבְנֵי מִשְׁמָע חַמּוּאֵל בְּנוֹ זַכּוּר בְּנוֹ שִׁמְעִי בְנוֹ׃
englishText: And the sons of Mishma: Hammuel his son, Zaccur his son, Shimei his son.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וּלְשִׁמְעִי בָּנִים שִׁשָּׁה עָשָׂר וּבָנוֹת שֵׁשׁ וּלְאֶחָיו אֵין בָּנִים רַבִּים וְכֹל מִשְׁפַּחְתָּם לֹא הִרְבּוּ עַד־בְּנֵי יְהוּדָה׃
englishText: And Shimei had sixteen sons and six daughters; but his brethren had not many children, neither did all their family multiply, like to the children of Judah.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וַיֵּשְׁבוּ בִּבְאֵר־שֶׁבַע וּמוֹלָדָה וַחֲצַר שׁוּעָל׃
englishText: And they dwelt at Beer-sheba, and Moladah, and Hazar-shual;
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וּבְבִלְהָה וּבְעֶצֶם וּבְתוֹלָד׃
englishText: and at Bilhah, and at Ezem, and at Tolad;
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וּבִבְתוּאֵל וּבְחָרְמָה וּבְצִיקְלָג׃
englishText: and at Bethuel, and at Hormah, and at Ziklag;
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וּבְבֵית מַרְכָּבוֹת וּבַחֲצַר סוּסִים וּבְבֵית בִּרְאִי וּבְשַׁעֲרָיִם אֵלֶּה עָרֵיהֶם עַד־מְלֹךְ דָּוִיד׃
englishText: and at Beth-marcaboth, and Hazar-susim, and at Beth-biri, and at Shaaraim. These were their cities unto the reign of David.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וְחַצְרֵיהֶם עֵיטָם וָעַיִן רִמּוֹן וְתֹכֶן וְעָשָׁן עָרִים חָמֵשׁ׃
englishText: And their villages were Etam, and Ain, Rimmon, and Tochen, and Ashan, five cities;
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וְכָל־חַצְרֵיהֶם אֲשֶׁר סְבִיבוֹת הֶעָרִים הָאֵלֶּה עַד־בָּעַל זֹאת מוֹשְׁבֹתָם וְהִתְיַחְשָׂם לָהֶם׃
englishText: and all their villages that were round about the same cities, unto Baal. These were their habitations, and they have their genealogy.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וּמְשׁוֹבָב וְיַמְלֵךְ וְיוֹשָׁה בֶּן־אֲמַצְיָה׃
englishText: And Meshobab, and Jamlech, and Joshah the son of Amaziah;
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וְיוֹאֵל וְיֵהוּא בֶּן־יוֹשִׁבְיָה בֶּן־שְׂרָיָה בֶּן־עֲשִׂיאֵל׃
englishText: and Joel, and Jehu the son of Joshibiah, the son of Seraiah, the son of Asiel;
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וְאֶלְיוֹעֵינַי וְיַעֲקֹבָה וִישׁוֹחָיָה וַעֲשָׂיָה וַעֲדִיאֵל וִישִׂימִאֵל וּבְנָיָה׃
englishText: and Elioenai, and Jaakobah, and Jeshoaiah, and Asaiah, and Adiel, and Jesimiel, and Benaiah;
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וְזִיזָא בֶן־שִׁפְעִי בֶן־אַלּוֹן בֶּן־יְדָיָה בֶן־שִׁמְרִי בֶּן־שְׁמַעְיָה׃
englishText: and Ziza the son of Shiphi, the son of Allon, the son of Jedaiah, the son of Shimri, the son of Shemaiah;
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: אֵלֶּה הַבָּאִים בְּשֵׁמוֹת נְשִׂיאִים בְּמִשְׁפְּחוֹתָם וּבֵית אֲבוֹתֵיהֶם פָּרְצוּ לָרוֹב׃
englishText: these mentioned by name were princes in their families; and their fathers’houses increased greatly.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וַיֵּלְכוּ לִמְבוֹא גְדֹר עַד לְמִזְרַח הַגָּיְא לְבַקֵּשׁ מִרְעֶה לְצֹאנָם׃
englishText: And they went to the entrance of Gedor, even unto the east side of the valley, to seek pasture for their flocks.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וַיִּמְצְאוּ מִרְעֶה שָׁמֵן וָטוֹב וְהָאָרֶץ רַחֲבַת יָדַיִם וְשֹׁקֶטֶת וּשְׁלֵוָה כִּי מִן־חָם הַיֹּשְׁבִים שָׁם לְפָנִים׃
englishText: And they found fat pasture and good, and the land was wide, and quiet, and peaceable; for they that dwelt there aforetime were of Ham.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וַיָּבֹאוּ אֵלֶּה הַכְּתוּבִים בְּשֵׁמוֹת בִּימֵי יְחִזְקִיָּהוּ מֶלֶךְ־יְהוּדָה וַיַּכּוּ אֶת־אָהֳלֵיהֶם וְאֶת־המעינים [הַמְּעוּנִים] אֲשֶׁר נִמְצְאוּ־שָׁמָּה וַיַּחֲרִימֻם עַד־הַיּוֹם הַזֶּה וַיֵּשְׁבוּ תַּחְתֵּיהֶם כִּי־מִרְעֶה לְצֹאנָם שָׁם׃
englishText: And these written by name came in the days of Hezekiah king of Judah, and smote their tents, and the Meunim that were found there, and destroyed them utterly, unto this day, and dwelt in their stead; because there was pasture there for their flocks.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וּמֵהֶם מִן־בְּנֵי שִׁמְעוֹן הָלְכוּ לְהַר שֵׂעִיר אֲנָשִׁים חֲמֵשׁ מֵאוֹת וּפְלַטְיָה וּנְעַרְיָה וּרְפָיָה וְעֻזִּיאֵל בְּנֵי יִשְׁעִי בְּרֹאשָׁם׃
englishText: And some of them, even of the sons of Simeon, five hundred men, went to mount Seir, having for their captains Pelatiah, and Neariah, and Rephaiah, and Uzziel, the sons of Ishi.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וַיַּכּוּ אֶת־שְׁאֵרִית הַפְּלֵטָה לַעֲמָלֵק וַיֵּשְׁבוּ שָׁם עַד הַיּוֹם הַזֶּה׃
englishText: And they smote the remnant of the Amalekites that escaped, and dwelt there unto this day.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וּבְנֵי רְאוּבֵן בְּכוֹר־יִשְׂרָאֵל כִּי הוּא הַבְּכוֹר וּבְחַלְּלוֹ יְצוּעֵי אָבִיו נִתְּנָה בְּכֹרָתוֹ לִבְנֵי יוֹסֵף בֶּן־יִשְׂרָאֵל וְלֹא לְהִתְיַחֵשׂ לַבְּכֹרָה׃
englishText: And the sons of Reuben the first-born of Israel—for he was the first-born; but, forasmuch as he defiled his father’s couch, his birthright was given unto the sons of Joseph the son of Israel, yet not so that he was to be reckoned in the genealogy as first-born.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: כִּי יְהוּדָה גָּבַר בְּאֶחָיו וּלְנָגִיד מִמֶּנּוּ וְהַבְּכֹרָה לְיוֹסֵף׃
englishText: For Judah prevailed above his brethren, and of him came he that is the prince; but the birthright was Joseph’s—
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: בְּנֵי רְאוּבֵן בְּכוֹר יִשְׂרָאֵל חֲנוֹךְ וּפַלּוּא חֶצְרוֹן וְכַרְמִי׃
englishText: the sons of Reuben the first-born of Israel: Hanoch, and Pallu, Hezron, and Carmi.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: בְּנֵי יוֹאֵל שְׁמַעְיָה בְנוֹ גּוֹג בְּנוֹ שִׁמְעִי בְנוֹ׃
englishText: The sons of Joel: Shemaiah his son, Gog his son, Shimei his son;
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: מִיכָה בְנוֹ רְאָיָה בְנוֹ בַּעַל בְּנוֹ׃
englishText: Micah his son, Reaiah his son, Baal his son;
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: בְּאֵרָה בְנוֹ אֲשֶׁר הֶגְלָה תִּלְּגַת פִּלְנְאֶסֶר מֶלֶךְ אַשֻּׁר הוּא נָשִׂיא לָראוּבֵנִי׃
englishText: Beerah his son, whom Tillegath-pilneser king of Assyria carried away captive; he was prince of the Reubenites.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וְאֶחָיו לְמִשְׁפְּחֹתָיו בְּהִתְיַחֵשׂ לְתֹלְדוֹתָם הָרֹאשׁ יְעִיאֵל וּזְכַרְיָהוּ׃
englishText: And his brethren by their families, when the genealogy of their generations was reckoned: the chief Jeiel, and Zechariah,
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וּבֶלַע בֶּן־עָזָז בֶּן־שֶׁמַע בֶּן־יוֹאֵל הוּא יוֹשֵׁב בַּעֲרֹעֵר וְעַד־נְבוֹ וּבַעַל מְעוֹן׃
englishText: and Bela the son of Azaz, the son of Shema, the son of Joel, who dwelt in Aroer, even unto Nebo and Baal-meon;
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וְלַמִּזְרָח יָשַׁב עַד־לְבוֹא מִדְבָּרָה לְמִן־הַנָּהָר פְּרָת כִּי מִקְנֵיהֶם רָבוּ בְּאֶרֶץ גִּלְעָד׃
englishText: and eastward he dwelt even unto the entrance of the wilderness from the river Euphrates; because their cattle were multiplied in the land of Gilead.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וּבִימֵי שָׁאוּל עָשׂוּ מִלְחָמָה עִם־הַהַגְרִאִים וַיִּפְּלוּ בְּיָדָם וַיֵּשְׁבוּ בְּאָהֳלֵיהֶם עַל־כָּל־פְּנֵי מִזְרָח לַגִּלְעָד׃
englishText: And in the days of Saul they made war with the Hagrites, who fell by their hand; and they dwelt in their tents throughout all the land east of Gilead.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וּבְנֵי־גָד לְנֶגְדָּם יָשְׁבוּ בְּאֶרֶץ הַבָּשָׁן עַד־סַלְכָה׃
englishText: And the sons of Gad dwelt over against them, in the land of Bashan unto Salcah:
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: יוֹאֵל הָרֹאשׁ וְשָׁפָם הַמִּשְׁנֶה וְיַעְנַי וְשָׁפָט בַּבָּשָׁן׃
englishText: Joel the chief, and Shapham the second, and Janai, and Shaphat in Bashan;
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וַאֲחֵיהֶם לְבֵית אֲבוֹתֵיהֶם מִיכָאֵל וּמְשֻׁלָּם וְשֶׁבַע וְיוֹרַי וְיַעְכָּן וְזִיעַ וָעֵבֶר שִׁבְעָה׃
englishText: and their brethren of their fathers’houses: Michael, and Meshullam, and Sheba, and Jorai, and Jacan, and Zia, and Eber, seven.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: אֵלֶּה בְּנֵי אֲבִיחַיִל בֶּן־חוּרִי בֶּן־יָרוֹחַ בֶּן־גִּלְעָד בֶּן־מִיכָאֵל בֶּן־יְשִׁישַׁי בֶּן־יַחְדּוֹ בֶּן־בּוּז׃
englishText: These were the sons of Abihail the son of Huri, the son of Jaroah, the son of Gilead, the son of Michael, the son of Jehishai, the son of Jahdo, the son of Buz;
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: אֲחִי בֶּן־עַבְדִּיאֵל בֶּן־גּוּנִי רֹאשׁ לְבֵית אֲבוֹתָם׃
englishText: Ahi the son of Abdiel, the son of Guni, chief of their fathers’houses.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וַיֵּשְׁבוּ בַּגִּלְעָד בַּבָּשָׁן וּבִבְנֹתֶיהָ וּבְכָל־מִגְרְשֵׁי שָׁרוֹן עַל־תּוֹצְאוֹתָם׃
englishText: And they dwelt in Gilead in Bashan, and in the towns thereof, and in all the open lands of the plain, upon their borders.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: כֻּלָּם הִתְיַחְשׂוּ בִּימֵי יוֹתָם מֶלֶךְ־יְהוּדָה וּבִימֵי יָרָבְעָם מֶלֶךְ־יִשְׂרָאֵל׃
englishText: All these were reckoned by genealogies in the days of Jotham king of Judah and in the days of Jeroboam king of Israel.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: בְּנֵי־רְאוּבֵן וְגָדִי וַחֲצִי שֵׁבֶט־מְנַשֶּׁה מִן־בְּנֵי־חַיִל אֲנָשִׁים נֹשְׂאֵי מָגֵן וְחֶרֶב וְדֹרְכֵי קֶשֶׁת וּלְמוּדֵי מִלְחָמָה אַרְבָּעִים וְאַרְבָּעָה אֶלֶף וּשְׁבַע־מֵאוֹת וְשִׁשִּׁים יֹצְאֵי צָבָא׃
englishText: The sons of Reuben, and the Gadites, and the half-tribe of Manasseh, as many as were valiant men, men able to bear buckler and sword, and to shoot with bow, and skilful in war, were forty and four thousand seven hundred and threescore, that were able to go forth to war.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וַיַּעֲשׂוּ מִלְחָמָה עִם־הַהַגְרִיאִים וִיטוּר וְנָפִישׁ וְנוֹדָב׃
englishText: And they made war with the Hagrites, with Jetur, and Naphish, and Nodab.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וַיֵּעָזְרוּ עֲלֵיהֶם וַיִּנָּתְנוּ בְיָדָם הַהַגְרִיאִים וְכֹל שֶׁעִמָּהֶם כִּי לֵאלֹהִים זָעֲקוּ בַּמִּלְחָמָה וְנַעְתּוֹר לָהֶם כִּי־בָטְחוּ בוֹ׃
englishText: And they were helped against them, and the Hagrites were delivered into their hand, and all that were with them; for they cried to God in the battle, and He was entreated of them, because they put their trust in Him.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וַיִּשְׁבּוּ מִקְנֵיהֶם גְּמַלֵּיהֶם חֲמִשִּׁים אֶלֶף וְצֹאן מָאתַיִם וַחֲמִשִּׁים אֶלֶף וַחֲמוֹרִים אַלְפָּיִם וְנֶפֶשׁ אָדָם מֵאָה אָלֶף׃
englishText: And they took away their cattle: of their camels fifty thousand, and of sheep two hundred and fifty thousand, and of asses two thousand; and of souls of men a hundred thousand.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: כִּי־חֲלָלִים רַבִּים נָפָלוּ כִּי מֵהָאֱלֹהִים הַמִּלְחָמָה וַיֵּשְׁבוּ תַחְתֵּיהֶם עַד־הַגֹּלָה׃
englishText: For there fell many slain, because the war was of God. And they dwelt in their stead until the captivity.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וּבְנֵי חֲצִי שֵׁבֶט מְנַשֶּׁה יָשְׁבוּ בָּאָרֶץ מִבָּשָׁן עַד־בַּעַל חֶרְמוֹן וּשְׂנִיר וְהַר־חֶרְמוֹן הֵמָּה רָבוּ׃
englishText: And the children of the half-tribe of Manasseh dwelt in the land, from Bashan unto Baal-hermon and Senir and mount Hermon, where they increased.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וְאֵלֶּה רָאשֵׁי בֵית־אֲבוֹתָם וְעֵפֶר וְיִשְׁעִי וֶאֱלִיאֵל וְעַזְרִיאֵל וְיִרְמְיָה וְהוֹדַוְיָה וְיַחְדִּיאֵל אֲנָשִׁים גִּבּוֹרֵי חַיִל אַנְשֵׁי שֵׁמוֹת רָאשִׁים לְבֵית אֲבוֹתָם׃
englishText: And these were the heads of their fathers’houses: Epher, and Ishi, and Eliel, and Azriel, and Jeremiah, and Hodaviah, and Jahdiel, mighty men of valour, famous men, heads of their fathers’houses.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וַיִּמְעֲלוּ בֵּאלֹהֵי אֲבוֹתֵיהֶם וַיִּזְנוּ אַחֲרֵי אֱלֹהֵי עַמֵּי־הָאָרֶץ אֲשֶׁר־הִשְׁמִיד אֱלֹהִים מִפְּנֵיהֶם׃
englishText: And they broke faith with the God of their fathers, and went astray after the gods of the peoples of the land, whom God destroyed before them.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וַיָּעַר אֱלֹהֵי יִשְׂרָאֵל אֶת־רוּחַ פּוּל מֶלֶךְ־אַשּׁוּר וְאֶת־רוּחַ תִּלְּגַת פִּלְנֶסֶר מֶלֶךְ אַשּׁוּר וַיַּגְלֵם לָראוּבֵנִי וְלַגָּדִי וְלַחֲצִי שֵׁבֶט מְנַשֶּׁה וַיְבִיאֵם לַחְלַח וְחָבוֹר וְהָרָא וּנְהַר גּוֹזָן עַד הַיּוֹם הַזֶּה׃
englishText: And the God of Israel stirred up the spirit of Pul king of Assyria, and the spirit of Tillegath-pilneser king of Assyria, and he carried them away, even the Reubenites, and the Gadites, and the half-tribe of Manasseh, and brought them unto Halah, and Habor, and Hara, and to the river of Gozan, unto this day.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: בְּנֵי לֵוִי גֵּרְשׁוֹן קְהָת וּמְרָרִי׃
englishText: The sons of Levi: Gershon, Kohath, and Merari.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וּבְנֵי קְהָת עַמְרָם יִצְהָר וְחֶבְרוֹן וְעֻזִּיאֵל׃
englishText: And the sons of Kohath: Amram, Izhar, and Hebron, and Uzziel.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וּבְנֵי עַמְרָם אַהֲרֹן וּמֹשֶׁה וּמִרְיָם וּבְנֵי אַהֲרֹן נָדָב וַאֲבִיהוּא אֶלְעָזָר וְאִיתָמָר׃
englishText: And the children of Amram: Aaron, and Moses, and Miriam. And the sons of Aaron: Nadab and Abihu, Eleazar and Ithamar.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: אֶלְעָזָר הוֹלִיד אֶת־פִּינְחָס פִּינְחָס הֹלִיד אֶת־אֲבִישׁוּעַ׃
englishText: Eleazar begot Phinehas, Phinehas begot Abishua;
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וַאֲבִישׁוּעַ הוֹלִיד אֶת־בֻּקִּי וּבֻקִּי הוֹלִיד אֶת־עֻזִּי׃
englishText: and Abishua begot Bukki, and Bukki begot Uzzi;
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וְעֻזִּי הוֹלִיד אֶת־זְרַחְיָה וּזְרַחְיָה הוֹלִיד אֶת־מְרָיוֹת׃
englishText: and Uzzi begot Zerahiah, and Zerahiah begot Meraioth;
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: מְרָיוֹת הוֹלִיד אֶת־אֲמַרְיָה וַאֲמַרְיָה הוֹלִיד אֶת־אֲחִיטוּב׃
englishText: Meraioth begot Amariah, and Amariah begot Ahitub;
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וַאֲחִיטוּב הוֹלִיד אֶת־צָדוֹק וְצָדוֹק הוֹלִיד אֶת־אֲחִימָעַץ׃
englishText: and Ahitub begot Zadok, and Zadok begot Ahimaaz;
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וַאֲחִימַעַץ הוֹלִיד אֶת־עֲזַרְיָה וַעֲזַרְיָה הוֹלִיד אֶת־יוֹחָנָן׃
englishText: and Ahimaaz begot Azariah, and Azariah begot Johanan;
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וְיוֹחָנָן הוֹלִיד אֶת־עֲזַרְיָה הוּא אֲשֶׁר כִּהֵן בַּבַּיִת אֲשֶׁר־בָּנָה שְׁלֹמֹה בִּירוּשָׁלִָם׃
englishText: and Johanan begot Azariah—he it is that executed the priest’s office in the house that Solomon built in Jerusalem—:
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וַיּוֹלֶד עֲזַרְיָה אֶת־אֲמַרְיָה וַאֲמַרְיָה הוֹלִיד אֶת־אֲחִיטוּב׃
englishText: and Azariah begot Amariah, and Amariah begot Ahitub;
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וַאֲחִיטוּב הוֹלִיד אֶת־צָדוֹק וְצָדוֹק הוֹלִיד אֶת־שַׁלּוּם׃
englishText: and Ahitub begot Zadok, and Zadok begot Shallum;
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וְשַׁלּוּם הוֹלִיד אֶת־חִלְקִיָּה וְחִלְקִיָּה הוֹלִיד אֶת־עֲזַרְיָה׃
englishText: and Shallum begot Hilkiah, and Hilkiah begot Azariah;
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וַעֲזַרְיָה הוֹלִיד אֶת־שְׂרָיָה וּשְׂרָיָה הוֹלִיד אֶת־יְהוֹצָדָק׃
englishText: and Azariah begot Seraiah, and Seraiah begot Jehozadak;
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וִיהוֹצָדָק הָלַךְ בְּהַגְלוֹת יְהוָה אֶת־יְהוּדָה וִירוּשָׁלִָם בְּיַד נְבֻכַדְנֶאצַּר׃
englishText: and Jehozadak went into captivity, when the LORD carried away Judah and Jerusalem by the hand of Nebuchadnezzar.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: בְּנֵי לֵוִי גֵּרְשֹׁם קְהָת וּמְרָרִי׃
englishText: The sons of Levi: Gershom, Kohath and Merari.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וְאֵלֶּה שְׁמוֹת בְּנֵי־גֵרְשׁוֹם לִבְנִי וְשִׁמְעִי׃
englishText: And these are the names of the sons of Gershom: Libni, and Shimei.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וּבְנֵי קְהָת עַמְרָם וְיִצְהָר וְחֶבְרוֹן וְעֻזִּיאֵל׃
englishText: And the sons of Kohath were Amram, and Izhar, and Hebron, and Uzziel.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: בְּנֵי מְרָרִי מַחְלִי וּמֻשִׁי וְאֵלֶּה מִשְׁפְּחוֹת הַלֵּוִי לַאֲבוֹתֵיהֶם׃
englishText: The sons of Merari: Mahli, and Mushi. And these are the families of the Levites according to their fathers’houses.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: לְגֵרְשׁוֹם לִבְנִי בְנוֹ יַחַת בְּנוֹ זִמָּה בְנוֹ׃
englishText: Of Gershom: Libni his son, Jahath his son, Zimmah his son;
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: יוֹאָח בְּנוֹ עִדּוֹ בְנוֹ זֶרַח בְּנוֹ יְאָתְרַי בְּנוֹ׃
englishText: Joah his son, Iddo his son, Zerah his son, Jeatherai his son. .
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: בְּנֵי קְהָת עַמִּינָדָב בְּנוֹ קֹרַח בְּנוֹ אַסִּיר בְּנוֹ׃
englishText: The sons of Kohath: Amminadab his son, Korah his son, Assir his son;
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: אֶלְקָנָה בְנוֹ וְאֶבְיָסָף בְּנוֹ וְאַסִּיר בְּנוֹ׃
englishText: Elkanah his son, and Ebiasaph his son, and Assir his son;
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: תַּחַת בְּנוֹ אוּרִיאֵל בְּנוֹ עֻזִּיָּה בְנוֹ וְשָׁאוּל בְּנוֹ׃
englishText: Tahath his son, Uriel his son, Uzziah his son, and Shaul his son.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וּבְנֵי אֶלְקָנָה עֲמָשַׂי וַאֲחִימוֹת׃
englishText: And the sons of Elkanah: Amasai, and Ahimoth.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: אֶלְקָנָה בנו [בְּנֵי] אֶלְקָנָה צוֹפַי בְּנוֹ וְנַחַת בְּנוֹ׃
englishText: As for Elkanah: the sons of Elkanah: Zophai his son, and Nahath his son;
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: אֱלִיאָב בְּנוֹ יְרֹחָם בְּנוֹ אֶלְקָנָה בְנוֹ׃
englishText: Eliab his son, Jeroham his son, Elkanah his son.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וּבְנֵי שְׁמוּאֵל הַבְּכֹר וַשְׁנִי וַאֲבִיָּה׃
englishText: And the sons of Samuel: the first-born Vashni; then Abiah.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: בְּנֵי מְרָרִי מַחְלִי לִבְנִי בְנוֹ שִׁמְעִי בְנוֹ עֻזָּה בְנוֹ׃
englishText: The sons of Merari: Mahli; Libni his son, Shimei his son, Uzzah his son;
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: שִׁמְעָא בְנוֹ חַגִּיָּה בְנוֹ עֲשָׂיָה בְנוֹ׃
englishText: Shimea his son, Haggiah his son, Asaiah his son.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וְאֵלֶּה אֲשֶׁר הֶעֱמִיד דָּוִיד עַל־יְדֵי־שִׁיר בֵּית יְהוָה מִמְּנוֹחַ הָאָרוֹן׃
englishText: And these are they whom David set over the service of song in the house of the LORD, after that the ark had rest.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וַיִּהְיוּ מְשָׁרְתִים לִפְנֵי מִשְׁכַּן אֹהֶל־מוֹעֵד בַּשִּׁיר עַד־בְּנוֹת שְׁלֹמֹה אֶת־בֵּית יְהוָה בִּירוּשָׁלִָם וַיַּעַמְדוּ כְמִשְׁפָּטָם עַל־עֲבוֹדָתָם׃
englishText: And they ministered with song before the tabernacle of the tent of meeting, until Solomon had built the house of the LORD in Jerusalem; and they took their station at their service according to their order.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וְאֵלֶּה הָעֹמְדִים וּבְנֵיהֶם מִבְּנֵי הַקְּהָתִי הֵימָן הַמְשׁוֹרֵר בֶּן־יוֹאֵל בֶּן־שְׁמוּאֵל׃
englishText: And these are they that took their station, and their sons. Of the sons of the Kohathites: Heman the singer, the son of Joel, the son of Samuel;
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: בֶּן־אֶלְקָנָה בֶּן־יְרֹחָם בֶּן־אֱלִיאֵל בֶּן־תּוֹחַ׃
englishText: the son of Elkanah, the son of Jeroham, the son of Eliel, the son of Toah;
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: בֶּן־ציף [צוּף] בֶּן־אֶלְקָנָה בֶּן־מַחַת בֶּן־עֲמָשָׂי׃
englishText: the son of Zuph, the son of Elkanah, the son of Mahath, the son of Amasai;
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: בֶּן־אֶלְקָנָה בֶּן־יוֹאֵל בֶּן־עֲזַרְיָה בֶּן־צְפַנְיָה׃
englishText: the son of Elkanah, the son of Joel, the son of Azariah, the son of Zephaniah;
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: בֶּן־תַּחַת בֶּן־אַסִּיר בֶּן־אֶבְיָסָף בֶּן־קֹרַח׃
englishText: the son of Tahath, the son of Assir, the son of Ebiasaph, the son of Korah;
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: בֶּן־יִצְהָר בֶּן־קְהָת בֶּן־לֵוִי בֶּן־יִשְׂרָאֵל׃
englishText: the son of Izhar, the son of Kohath, the son of Levi, the son of Israel.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וְאָחִיו אָסָף הָעֹמֵד עַל־יְמִינוֹ אָסָף בֶּן־בֶּרֶכְיָהוּ בֶּן־שִׁמְעָא׃
englishText: And his brother Asaph, who stood on his right hand; even Asaph the son of Berechiah, the son of Shimea;
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: בֶּן־מִיכָאֵל בֶּן־בַּעֲשֵׂיָה בֶּן־מַלְכִּיָּה׃
englishText: the son of Michael, the son of Baaseiah, the son of Malchijah;
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: בֶּן־אֶתְנִי בֶן־זֶרַח בֶּן־עֲדָיָה׃
englishText: the son of Ethni, the son of Zerah, the son of Adaiah;
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: בֶּן־אֵיתָן בֶּן־זִמָּה בֶּן־שִׁמְעִי׃
englishText: the son of Ethan, the son of Zimmah, the son of Shimei;
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: בֶּן־יַחַת בֶּן־גֵּרְשֹׁם בֶּן־לֵוִי׃
englishText: the son of Jahath, the son of Gershom, the son of Levi.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וּבְנֵי מְרָרִי אֲחֵיהֶם עַל־הַשְּׂמֹאול אֵיתָן בֶּן־קִישִׁי בֶּן־עַבְדִּי בֶּן־מַלּוּךְ׃
englishText: And on the left hand their brethren the sons of Merari: Ethan the son of Kishi, the son of Abdi, the son of Malluch;
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: בֶּן־חֲשַׁבְיָה בֶן־אֲמַצְיָה בֶּן־חִלְקִיָּה׃
englishText: the son of Hashabiah, the son of Amaziah, the son of Hilkiah;
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: בֶּן־אַמְצִי בֶן־בָּנִי בֶּן־שָׁמֶר׃
englishText: the son of Amzi, the son of Bani, the son of Shemer;
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: בֶּן־מַחְלִי בֶּן־מוּשִׁי בֶּן־מְרָרִי בֶּן־לֵוִי׃
englishText: the son of Mahli, the son of Mushi, the son of Merari, the son of Levi.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וַאֲחֵיהֶם הַלְוִיִּם נְתוּנִים לְכָל־עֲבוֹדַת מִשְׁכַּן בֵּית הָאֱלֹהִים׃
englishText: And their brethren the Levites were appointed for all the service of the tabernacle of the house of God.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וְאַהֲרֹן וּבָנָיו מַקְטִירִים עַל־מִזְבַּח הָעוֹלָה וְעַל־מִזְבַּח הַקְּטֹרֶת לְכֹל מְלֶאכֶת קֹדֶשׁ הַקֳּדָשִׁים וּלְכַפֵּר עַל־יִשְׂרָאֵל כְּכֹל אֲשֶׁר צִוָּה מֹשֶׁה עֶבֶד הָאֱלֹהִים׃
englishText: But Aaron and his sons offered upon the altar of burnt-offering, and upon the altar of incense, for all the work of the most holy place, and to make atonement for Israel, according to all that Moses the servant of God had commanded.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וְאֵלֶּה בְּנֵי אַהֲרֹן אֶלְעָזָר בְּנוֹ פִּינְחָס בְּנוֹ אֲבִישׁוּעַ בְּנוֹ׃
englishText: And these are the sons of Aaron: Eleazar his son, Phinehas his son, Abishua his son;
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: בֻּקִּי בְנוֹ עֻזִּי בְנוֹ זְרַחְיָה בְנוֹ׃
englishText: Bukki his son, Uzzi his son, Zerahiah his son;
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: מְרָיוֹת בְּנוֹ אֲמַרְיָה בְנוֹ אֲחִיטוּב בְּנוֹ׃
englishText: Meraioth his son, Amariah his son, Ahitub his son;
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: צָדוֹק בְּנוֹ אֲחִימַעַץ בְּנוֹ׃
englishText: Zadok his son, Ahimaaz his son.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וְאֵלֶּה מוֹשְׁבוֹתָם לְטִירוֹתָם בִּגְבוּלָם לִבְנֵי אַהֲרֹן לְמִשְׁפַּחַת הַקְּהָתִי כִּי לָהֶם הָיָה הַגּוֹרָל׃
englishText: Now these are their dwelling-places according to their encampments in their borders: to the sons of Aaron, of the families of the Kohathites, for theirs was the [first] lot,
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וַיִּתְּנוּ לָהֶם אֶת־חֶבְרוֹן בְּאֶרֶץ יְהוּדָה וְאֶת־מִגְרָשֶׁיהָ סְבִיבֹתֶיהָ׃
englishText: to them they gave Hebron in the land of Judah, and the open land round about it;
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וְאֶת־שְׂדֵה הָעִיר וְאֶת־חֲצֵרֶיהָ נָתְנוּ לְכָלֵב בֶּן־יְפֻנֶּה׃
englishText: but the fields of the city, and the villages thereof, they gave to Caleb the son of Jephunneh.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וְלִבְנֵי אַהֲרֹן נָתְנוּ אֶת־עָרֵי הַמִּקְלָט אֶת־חֶבְרוֹן וְאֶת־לִבְנָה וְאֶת־מִגְרָשֶׁיהָ וְאֶת־יַתִּר וְאֶת־אֶשְׁתְּמֹעַ וְאֶת־מִגְרָשֶׁיהָ׃
englishText: And to the sons of Aaron they gave the acity of refuge, Hebron; Libnah also with the open land about it, and Jattir, and Eshtemoa with the open land about it;
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וְאֶת־חִילֵז וְאֶת־מִגְרָשֶׁיהָ אֶת־דְּבִיר וְאֶת־מִגְרָשֶׁיהָ׃
englishText: and Hilen with the open land about it, Debir with the open land about it;
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וְאֶת־עָשָׁן וְאֶת־מִגְרָשֶׁיהָ וְאֶת־בֵּית שֶׁמֶשׁ וְאֶת־מִגְרָשֶׁיהָ׃
englishText: and Ashan with the open land about it, and Beth-shemesh with the open land about it;
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וּמִמַּטֵּה בִנְיָמִן אֶת־גֶּבַע וְאֶת־מִגְרָשֶׁיהָ וְאֶת־עָלֶמֶת וְאֶת־מִגְרָשֶׁיהָ וְאֶת־עֲנָתוֹת וְאֶת־מִגְרָשֶׁיהָ כָּל־עָרֵיהֶם שְׁלֹשׁ־עֶשְׂרֵה עִיר בְּמִשְׁפְּחוֹתֵיהֶם׃
englishText: and out of the tribe of Benjamin: Geba with the open land about it, and Alemeth with the open land about it, and Anathoth with the open land about it. All their cities throughout their families were thirteen cities.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וְלִבְנֵי קְהָת הַנּוֹתָרִים מִמִּשְׁפַּחַת הַמַּטֶּה מִמַּחֲצִית מַטֵּה חֲצִי מְנַשֶּׁה בַּגּוֹרָל עָרִים עָשֶׂר׃
englishText: And unto the rest of the sons of Kohath were given by lot, out of the family of the tribe, out of the half-tribe, the half of Manasseh, ten cities.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וְלִבְנֵי גֵרְשׁוֹם לְמִשְׁפְּחוֹתָם מִמַּטֵּה יִשָׂשכָר וּמִמַּטֵּה אָשֵׁר וּמִמַּטֵּה נַפְתָּלִי וּמִמַּטֵּה מְנַשֶּׁה בַּבָּשָׁן עָרִים שְׁלֹשׁ עֶשְׂרֵה׃
englishText: And to the sons of Gershom, according to their families, out of the tribe of Issachar, and out of the tribe of Asher, and out of the tribe of Naphtali, and out of the tribe of Manasseh in Bashan, thirteen cities.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: לִבְנֵי מְרָרִי לְמִשְׁפְּחוֹתָם מִמַּטֵּה רְאוּבֵן וּמִמַּטֵּה־גָד וּמִמַּטֵּה זְבוּלֻן בַּגּוֹרָל עָרִים שְׁתֵּים עֶשְׂרֵה׃
englishText: Unto the sons of Merari were given by lot, according to their families, out of the tribe of Reuben, and out of the tribe of Gad, and out of the tribe of Zebulun, twelve cities.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וַיִּתְּנוּ בְנֵי־יִשְׂרָאֵל לַלְוִיִּם אֶת־הֶעָרִים וְאֶת־מִגְרְשֵׁיהֶם׃
englishText: So the children of Israel gave to the Levites the cities with the open land about them.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וַיִּתְּנוּ בַגּוֹרָל מִמַּטֵּה בְנֵי־יְהוּדָה וּמִמַּטֵּה בְנֵי־שִׁמְעוֹן וּמִמַּטֵּה בְּנֵי בִנְיָמִן אֵת הֶעָרִים הָאֵלֶּה אֲשֶׁר־יִקְרְאוּ אֶתְהֶם בְּשֵׁמוֹת׃
englishText: And they gave by lot out of the tribe of the children of Judah, and out of the tribe of the children of Simeon, and out of the tribe of the children of Benjamin, these cities which are mentioned by name.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וּמִמִּשְׁפְּחוֹת בְּנֵי קְהָת וַיְהִי עָרֵי גְבוּלָם מִמַּטֵּה אֶפְרָיִם׃
englishText: And some of the families of the sons of Kohath had cities of their borders out of the tribe of Ephraim.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וַיִּתְּנוּ לָהֶם אֶת־עָרֵי הַמִּקְלָט אֶת־שְׁכֶם וְאֶת־מִגְרָשֶׁיהָ בְּהַר אֶפְרָיִם וְאֶת־גֶּזֶר וְאֶת־מִגְרָשֶׁיהָ׃
englishText: And they gave unto them the bcity of refuge, Shechem in the hill-country of Ephraim with the open land about it; Gezer also with the open land about it;
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וְאֶת־יָקְמְעָם וְאֶת־מִגְרָשֶׁיהָ וְאֶת־בֵּית חוֹרוֹן וְאֶת־מִגְרָשֶׁיהָ׃
englishText: and Jokmeam with the open land about it, and Bethhoron with the open land about it;
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וְאֶת־אַיָּלוֹן וְאֶת־מִגְרָשֶׁיהָ וְאֶת־גַּת־רִמּוֹן וְאֶת־מִגְרָשֶׁיהָ׃
englishText: and Aijalon with the open land about it, and Gath-rimmon with the open land about it;
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וּמִמַּחֲצִית מַטֵּה מְנַשֶּׁה אֶת־עָנֵר וְאֶת־מִגְרָשֶׁיהָ וְאֶת־בִּלְעָם וְאֶת־מִגְרָשֶׁיהָ לְמִשְׁפַּחַת לִבְנֵי־קְהָת הַנּוֹתָרִים׃
englishText: and out of the half-tribe of Manasseh: Aner with the open land about it, and Bileam with the open land about it, for the rest of the family of the sons of Kohath.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: לִבְנֵי גֵּרְשׁוֹם מִמִּשְׁפַּחַת חֲצִי מַטֵּה מְנַשֶּׁה אֶת־גּוֹלָן בַּבָּשָׁן וְאֶת־מִגְרָשֶׁיהָ וְאֶת־עַשְׁתָּרוֹת וְאֶת־מִגְרָשֶׁיהָ׃
englishText: Unto the sons of Gershom were given, out of the family of the half-tribe of Manasseh, Golan in Bashan with the open land about it, and Ashtaroth with the open land about it;
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וּמִמַּטֵּה יִשָׂשכָר אֶת־קֶדֶשׁ וְאֶת־מִגְרָשֶׁיהָ אֶת־דָּבְרַת וְאֶת־מִגְרָשֶׁיהָ׃
englishText: and out of the tribe of Issachar: Kedesh with the open land about it, Dobrath with the open land about it;
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וְאֶת־רָאמוֹת וְאֶת־מִגְרָשֶׁיהָ וְאֶת־עָנֵם וְאֶת־מִגְרָשֶׁיהָ׃
englishText: and Ramoth with the open land about it, and Anem with the open land about it;
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וּמִמַּטֵּה אָשֵׁר אֶת־מָשָׁל וְאֶת־מִגְרָשֶׁיהָ וְאֶת־עַבְדּוֹן וְאֶת־מִגְרָשֶׁיהָ׃
englishText: and out of the tribe of Asher: Mashal with the open land about it, and Abdon with the open land about it;
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וְאֶת־חוּקֹק וְאֶת־מִגְרָשֶׁיהָ וְאֶת־רְחֹב וְאֶת־מִגְרָשֶׁיהָ׃
englishText: and Hukok with the open land about it; and Rehob with the open land about it;
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וּמִמַּטֵּה נַפְתָּלִי אֶת־קֶדֶשׁ בַּגָּלִיל וְאֶת־מִגְרָשֶׁיהָ וְאֶת־חַמּוֹן וְאֶת־מִגְרָשֶׁיהָ וְאֶת־קִרְיָתַיִם וְאֶת־מִגְרָשֶׁיהָ׃
englishText: and out of the tribe of Naphtali: Kedesh in Galilee with the open land about it, and Hammon with the open land about it, and Kiriathaim with the open land about it.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: לִבְנֵי מְרָרִי הַנּוֹתָרִים מִמַּטֵּה זְבוּלֻן אֶת־רִמּוֹנוֹ וְאֶת־מִגְרָשֶׁיהָ אֶת־תָּבוֹר וְאֶת־מִגְרָשֶׁיהָ׃
englishText: Unto the rest [of the Levites], the sons of Merari, were given, out of the tribe of Zebulun, Rimmono with the open land about it, Tabor with the open land about it;
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וּמֵעֵבֶר לְיַרְדֵּן יְרֵחוֹ לְמִזְרַח הַיַּרְדֵּן מִמַּטֵּה רְאוּבֵן אֶת־בֶּצֶר בַּמִּדְבָּר וְאֶת־מִגְרָשֶׁיהָ וְאֶת־יַהְצָה וְאֶת־מִגְרָשֶׁיהָ׃
englishText: and beyond the Jordan at Jericho, on the east side of the Jordan, were given them, out of the tribe of Reuben, Bezer in the wilderness with the open land about it, and Jahaz with the open land about it,
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וְאֶת־קְדֵמוֹת וְאֶת־מִגְרָשֶׁיהָ וְאֶת־מֵיפַעַת וְאֶת־מִגְרָשֶׁיהָ׃
englishText: and Kedemoth with the open land about it, and Mephaath with the open land about it;
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וּמִמַּטֵּה־גָד אֶת־רָאמוֹת בַּגִּלְעָד וְאֶת־מִגְרָשֶׁיהָ וְאֶת־מַחֲנַיִם וְאֶת־מִגְרָשֶׁיהָ׃
englishText: and out of the tribe of Gad: Ramoth in Gilead with the open land about it, and Mahanaim with the open land about it,
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וְאֶת־חֶשְׁבּוֹן וְאֶת־מִגְרָשֶׁיהָ וְאֶת־יַעְזֵיר וְאֶת־מִגְרָשֶׁיהָ׃
englishText: and Heshbon with the open land about it, and Jazer with the open land about it.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וְלִבְנֵי יִשָׂשכָר תּוֹלָע וּפוּאָה ישיב [יָשׁוּב] וְשִׁמְרוֹן אַרְבָּעָה׃
englishText: And of the sons of Issachar: Tola, and Puah, Jashub, and Shimron, four.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וּבְנֵי תוֹלָע עֻזִּי וּרְפָיָה וִירִיאֵל וְיַחְמַי וְיִבְשָׂם וּשְׁמוּאֵל רָאשִׁים לְבֵית־אֲבוֹתָם לְתוֹלָע גִּבּוֹרֵי חַיִל לְתֹלְדוֹתָם מִסְפָּרָם בִּימֵי דָוִיד עֶשְׂרִים־וּשְׁנַיִם אֶלֶף וְשֵׁשׁ מֵאוֹת׃
englishText: And the sons of Tola: Uzzi and Rephaiah, and Jeriel, and Jahmai, and Ibsam, and Shemuel, heads of their fathers’houses, mighty men of valour according to their generations, even of Tola; their number in the days of David was two and twenty thousand and six hundred.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וּבְנֵי עֻזִּי יִזְרַחְיָה וּבְנֵי יִזְרַחְיָה מִיכָאֵל וְעֹבַדְיָה וְיוֹאֵל יִשִּׁיָּה חֲמִשָּׁה רָאשִׁים כֻּלָּם׃
englishText: And the sons of Uzzi: Izrahiah; and the sons of Izrahiah: Michael, and Obadiah, and Joel, Isshiah, five; all of them chief men.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וַעֲלֵיהֶם לְתֹלְדוֹתָם לְבֵית אֲבוֹתָם גְּדוּדֵי צְבָא מִלְחָמָה שְׁלֹשִׁים וְשִׁשָּׁה אָלֶף כִּי־הִרְבּוּ נָשִׁים וּבָנִים׃
englishText: And with them, by their generations, after their fathers’houses, were bands of the host for war, six and thirty thousand; for they had many wives and sons.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וַאֲחֵיהֶם לְכֹל מִשְׁפְּחוֹת יִשָׂשכָר גִּבּוֹרֵי חֲיָלִים שְׁמוֹנִים וְשִׁבְעָה אֶלֶף הִתְיַחְשָׂם לַכֹּל׃
englishText: And their brethren among all the families of Issachar, mighty men of valour, reckoned in all by genealogy, were fourscore and seven thousand.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: בִּנְיָמִן בֶּלַע וָבֶכֶר וִידִיעֲאֵל שְׁלֹשָׁה׃
englishText: [The sons of] Benjamin: Bela, and Becher, and Jediael, three.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וּבְנֵי בֶלַע אֶצְבּוֹן וְעֻזִּי וְעֻזִּיאֵל וִירִימוֹת וְעִירִי חֲמִשָּׁה רָאשֵׁי בֵּית אָבוֹת גִּבּוֹרֵי חֲיָלִים וְהִתְיַחְשָׂם עֶשְׂרִים וּשְׁנַיִם אֶלֶף וּשְׁלֹשִׁים וְאַרְבָּעָה׃
englishText: And the sons of Bela: Ezbon, and Uzzi, and Uzziel, and Jerimoth, and Iri, five; heads of fathers’houses, mighty men of valour; and they were reckoned by genealogy twenty and two thousand and thirty and four.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וּבְנֵי בֶכֶר זְמִירָה וְיוֹעָשׁ וֶאֱלִיעֶזֶר וְאֶלְיוֹעֵינַי וְעָמְרִי וִירֵמוֹת וַאֲבִיָּה וַעֲנָתוֹת וְעָלָמֶת כָּל־אֵלֶּה בְּנֵי־בָכֶר׃
englishText: And the sons of Becher: Zemirah, and Joash, and Eliezer, and Elioenai, and Omri, and Jeremoth, and Abijah, and Anathoth, and Alemeth. All these were the sons of Becher.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וְהִתְיַחְשָׂם לְתֹלְדוֹתָם רָאשֵׁי בֵּית אֲבוֹתָם גִּבּוֹרֵי חָיִל עֶשְׂרִים אֶלֶף וּמָאתָיִם׃
englishText: And they were reckoned by genealogy, after their generations, heads of their fathers’houses, mighty men of valour, twenty thousand and two hundred.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וּבְנֵי יְדִיעֲאֵל בִּלְהָן וּבְנֵי בִלְהָן יעיש [יְעוּשׁ] וּבִנְיָמִן וְאֵהוּד וּכְנַעֲנָה וְזֵיתָן וְתַרְשִׁישׁ וַאֲחִישָׁחַר׃
englishText: And the sons of Jediael: Bilhan; and the sons of Bilhan: Jeush, and Benjamin, and Ehud, and Chenaanah, and Zethan, and Tarshish, and Ahishahar.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: כָּל־אֵלֶּה בְּנֵי יְדִיעֲאֵל לְרָאשֵׁי הָאָבוֹת גִּבּוֹרֵי חֲיָלִים שִׁבְעָה־עָשָׂר אֶלֶף וּמָאתַיִם יֹצְאֵי צָבָא לַמִּלְחָמָה׃
englishText: All these were sons of Jediael, even heads of their fathers’houses, mighty men of valour, seventeen thousand and two hundred, that were able to go forth in the host for war.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וְשֻׁפִּם וְחֻפִּם בְּנֵי עִיר חֻשִׁם בְּנֵי אַחֵר׃
englishText: Shuppim also, and Huppim, the sons of Ir, Hushim, the son of aanother.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)
