originalText: בְּנֵי נַפְתָּלִי יַחֲצִיאֵל וְגוּנִי וְיֵצֶר וְשַׁלּוּם בְּנֵי בִלְהָה׃
englishText: The sons of Naphtali: Jahziel, and Guni, and Jezer, and Shallum, the sons of Bilhah.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: בְּנֵי מְנַשֶּׁה אַשְׂרִיאֵל אֲשֶׁר יָלָדָה פִּילַגְשׁוֹ הָאֲרַמִּיָּה יָלְדָה אֶת־מָכִיר אֲבִי גִלְעָד׃
englishText: The sons of Manasseh: Asriel, whom his wife bore—his concubine the Aramitess bore Machir the father of Gilead;
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וּמָכִיר לָקַח אִשָּׁה לְחֻפִּים וּלְשֻׁפִּים וְשֵׁם אֲחֹתוֹ מַעֲכָה וְשֵׁם הַשֵּׁנִי צְלָפְחָד וַתִּהְיֶנָה לִצְלָפְחָד בָּנוֹת׃
englishText: and Machir took a wife of Huppim and Shuppim, whose sister’s name was Maacah—and the name of the second was Zelophehad; and Zelophehad had daughters.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וַתֵּלֶד מַעֲכָה אֵשֶׁת־מָכִיר בֵּן וַתִּקְרָא שְׁמוֹ פֶּרֶשׁ וְשֵׁם אָחִיו שָׁרֶשׁ וּבָנָיו אוּלָם וָרָקֶם׃
englishText: And Maacah the wife of Machir bore a son, and she called his name Peresh; and the name of his brother was Sheresh; and his sons were Ulam and Rekem.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וּבְנֵי אוּלָם בְּדָן אֵלֶּה בְּנֵי גִלְעָד בֶּן־מָכִיר בֶּן־מְנַשֶּׁה׃
englishText: And the sons of Ulam: Bedan. These were the sons of Gilead the son of Machir, the son of Manasseh.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וַאֲחֹתוֹ הַמֹּלֶכֶת יָלְדָה אֶת־אִישְׁהוֹד וְאֶת־אֲבִיעֶזֶר וְאֶת־מַחְלָה׃
englishText: And his sister Hammolecheth bore Ish-hod, and Abiezer, and Mahlah.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וַיִּהְיוּ בְּנֵי שְׁמִידָע אַחְיָן וָשֶׁכֶם וְלִקְחִי וַאֲנִיעָם׃
englishText: And the sons of Shemida were Ahian, and Shechem, and Likhi, and Aniam.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וּבְנֵי אֶפְרַיִם שׁוּתָלַח וּבֶרֶד בְּנוֹ וְתַחַת בְּנוֹ וְאֶלְעָדָה בְנוֹ וְתַחַת בְּנוֹ׃
englishText: And the sons of Ephraim: Shuthelah—and Bered was his son, and Tahath his son, and Eleadah his son, and Tahath his son,
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וְזָבָד בְּנוֹ וְשׁוּתֶלַח בְּנוֹ וְעֵזֶר וְאֶלְעָד וַהֲרָגוּם אַנְשֵׁי־גַת הַנּוֹלָדִים בָּאָרֶץ כִּי יָרְדוּ לָקַחַת אֶת־מִקְנֵיהֶם׃
englishText: and Zabad his son, and Shuthelah his son—and Ezer, and Elead, whom the men of Gath that were born in the land slew, because they came down to take away their cattle.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וַיִּתְאַבֵּל אֶפְרַיִם אֲבִיהֶם יָמִים רַבִּים וַיָּבֹאוּ אֶחָיו לְנַחֲמוֹ׃
englishText: And Ephraim their father mourned many days, and his brethren came to comfort him.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וַיָּבֹא אֶל־אִשְׁתּוֹ וַתַּהַר וַתֵּלֶד בֵּן וַיִּקְרָא אֶת־שְׁמוֹ בְּרִיעָה כִּי בְרָעָה הָיְתָה בְּבֵיתוֹ׃
englishText: And he went in to his wife, and she conceived, and bore a son, and he called his name Beriah, because ait went evil with his house.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וּבִתּוֹ שֶׁאֱרָה וַתִּבֶן אֶת־בֵּית־חוֹרוֹן הַתַּחְתּוֹן וְאֶת־הָעֶלְיוֹן וְאֵת אֻזֵּן שֶׁאֱרָה׃
englishText: And his daughter was Sheerah, who built Beth-horon the nether and the upper, and Uzzen-sheerah.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וְרֶפַח בְּנוֹ וְרֶשֶׁף וְתֶלַח בְּנוֹ וְתַחַן בְּנוֹ׃
englishText: And Rephah was his son, and Resheph, and Telah his son, and Tahan his son;
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: לַעְדָּן בְּנוֹ עַמִּיהוּד בְּנוֹ אֱלִישָׁמָע בְּנוֹ׃
englishText: Ladan his son, Ammihud his son, Elishama his son;
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: נוֹן בְּנוֹ יְהוֹשֻׁעַ בְּנוֹ׃
englishText: Nun his son, Joshua his son.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וַאֲחֻזָּתָם וּמֹשְׁבוֹתָם בֵּית־אֵל וּבְנֹתֶיהָ וְלַמִּזְרָח נַעֲרָן וְלַמַּעֲרָב גֶּזֶר וּבְנֹתֶיהָ וּשְׁכֶם וּבְנֹתֶיהָ עַד־עַיָּה וּבְנֹתֶיהָ׃
englishText: And their possessions and habitations were Beth-el and the towns thereof, and eastward Naaran, and westward Gezer, with the towns thereof; Shechem also and the towns thereof, unto Aiah and the towns thereof;
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וְעַל־יְדֵי בְנֵי־מְנַשֶּׁה בֵּית־שְׁאָן וּבְנֹתֶיהָ תַּעְנַךְ וּבְנֹתֶיהָ מְגִדּוֹ וּבְנוֹתֶיהָ דּוֹר וּבְנוֹתֶיהָ בְּאֵלֶּה יָשְׁבוּ בְּנֵי יוֹסֵף בֶּן־יִשְׂרָאֵל׃
englishText: and by the borders of the children of Manasseh, Beth-shean and the towns thereof, Taanach and the towns thereof, Megiddo and the towns thereof, Dor and the towns thereof. In these dwelt the children of Joseph the son of Israel.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: בְּנֵי אָשֵׁר יִמְנָה וְיִשְׁוָה וְיִשְׁוִי וּבְרִיעָה וְשֶׂרַח אֲחוֹתָם׃
englishText: The sons of Asher: Imnah, and Ishvah, and Ishvi, and Beriah, and Serah their sister.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וּבְנֵי בְרִיעָה חֶבֶר וּמַלְכִּיאֵל הוּא אֲבִי ברזות [בִרְזָיִת׃]
englishText: And the sons of Beriah: Heber, and Malchiel, who was the father of Birzaith.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וְחֶבֶר הוֹלִיד אֶת־יַפְלֵט וְאֶת־שׁוֹמֵר וְאֶת־חוֹתָם וְאֵת שׁוּעָא אֲחוֹתָם׃
englishText: And Heber begot Japhlet, and Shomer, and Hotham, and Shua their sister.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וּבְנֵי יַפְלֵט פָּסַךְ וּבִמְהָל וְעַשְׁוָת אֵלֶּה בְּנֵי יַפְלֵט׃
englishText: And the sons of Japhlet: Pasach, and Bimhal, and Asvath. These are the children of Japhlet.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וּבְנֵי שָׁמֶר אֲחִי ורוהגה [וְרָהְגָּה] יחבה [וְחֻבָּה] וַאֲרָם׃
englishText: And the sons of Shemer: Ahi, and Rohgah, and Hubbah, and Aram.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וּבֶן־הֵלֶם אָחִיו צוֹפַח וְיִמְנָע וְשֵׁלֶשׁ וְעָמָל׃
englishText: And the sons of Helem his brother: Zophah, and Imna, and Shelesh, and Amal.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: בְּנֵי צוֹפָח סוּחַ וְחַרְנֶפֶר וְשׁוּעָל וּבֵרִי וְיִמְרָה׃
englishText: The sons of Zophah: Suah, and Harnepher, and Shaul, and Beri, and Imrah;
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: בֶּצֶר וָהוֹד וְשַׁמָּא וְשִׁלְשָׁה וְיִתְרָן וּבְאֵרָא׃
englishText: Bezer, and Hod, and Shamma, and Shilsha, and Ithran, and Beera.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וּבְנֵי יֶתֶר יְפֻנֶּה וּפִסְפָּה וַאְרָא׃
englishText: And the sons of Jether: Jephunneh, and Pispa, and Ara.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וּבְנֵי עֻלָּא אָרַח וְחַנִּיאֵל וְרִצְיָא׃
englishText: And the sons of Ulla: Arah, and Hanniel, and Rizia.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: כָּל־אֵלֶּה בְנֵי־אָשֵׁר רָאשֵׁי בֵית־הָאָבוֹת בְּרוּרִים גִּבּוֹרֵי חֲיָלִים רָאשֵׁי הַנְּשִׂיאִים וְהִתְיַחְשָׂם בַּצָּבָא בַּמִּלְחָמָה מִסְפָּרָם אֲנָשִׁים עֶשְׂרִים וְשִׁשָּׁה אָלֶף׃
englishText: All these were the children of Asher, heads of the fathers’houses, choice and mighty men of valour, chief of the princes. And the number of them reckoned by genealogy for service in war was twenty and six thousand men.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וּבִנְיָמִן הוֹלִיד אֶת־בֶּלַע בְּכֹרוֹ אַשְׁבֵּל הַשֵּׁנִי וְאַחְרַח הַשְּׁלִישִׁי׃
englishText: And Benjamin begot Bela his first-born, Ashbel the second, and Aharah the third;
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: נוֹחָה הָרְבִיעִי וְרָפָא הַחֲמִישִׁי׃
englishText: Nohah the fourth, and Rapha the fifth.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וַיִּהְיוּ בָנִים לְבָלַע אַדָּר וְגֵרָא וַאֲבִיהוּד׃
englishText: And Bela had sons, Addar, and Gera, and Abihud;
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וַאֲבִישׁוּעַ וְנַעֲמָן וַאֲחוֹחַ׃
englishText: and Abishua, and Naaman, and Ahoah;
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וְגֵרָא וּשְׁפוּפָן וְחוּרָם׃
englishText: and Gera, and Shephuphan, and Huram.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וְאֵלֶּה בְּנֵי אֵחוּד אֵלֶּה הֵם רָאשֵׁי אָבוֹת לְיוֹשְׁבֵי גֶבַע וַיַּגְלוּם אֶל־מָנָחַת׃
englishText: And these are the sons of Ehud—these are the heads of fathers’houses of the inhabitants of Geba, and they were carried captive to Manahath;
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וְנַעֲמָן וַאֲחִיָּה וְגֵרָא הוּא הֶגְלָם וְהוֹלִיד אֶת־עֻזָּא וְאֶת־אֲחִיחֻד׃
englishText: and Naaman, and Ahijah, and Gera, were they that carried them captive—and he begot Uzza, and Ahihud.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וְשַׁחֲרַיִם הוֹלִיד בִּשְׂדֵה מוֹאָב מִן־שִׁלְחוֹ אֹתָם חוּשִׁים וְאֶת־בַּעֲרָא נָשָׁיו׃
englishText: And Shaharaim begot children in the field of Moab, after he had sent them away, to wit, Hushim and Baara his wives;
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וַיּוֹלֶד מִן־חֹדֶשׁ אִשְׁתּוֹ אֶת־יוֹבָב וְאֶת־צִבְיָא וְאֶת־מֵישָׁא וְאֶת־מַלְכָּם׃
englishText: he begot of Hodesh his wife, Jobab, and Zibia, and Mesha, and Malcam;
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וְאֶת־יְעוּץ וְאֶת־שָׂכְיָה וְאֶת־מִרְמָה אֵלֶּה בָנָיו רָאשֵׁי אָבוֹת׃
englishText: and Jeuz, and Sachiah, and Mirmah. These were his sons, heads of fathers’houses.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וּמֵחֻשִׁים הוֹלִיד אֶת־אֲבִיטוּב וְאֶת־אֶלְפָּעַל׃
englishText: and of Hushim he begot Abitub, and Elpaal.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וּבְנֵי אֶלְפַּעַל עֵבֶר וּמִשְׁעָם וָשָׁמֶד הוּא בָּנָה אֶת־אוֹנוֹ וְאֶת־לֹד וּבְנֹתֶיהָ׃
englishText: And the sons of Elpaal: Eber, and Misham, and Shemed, who built Ono, and Lod, with the towns thereof;
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וּבְרִעָה וָשֶׁמַע הֵמָּה רָאשֵׁי הָאָבוֹת לְיוֹשְׁבֵי אַיָּלוֹן הֵמָּה הִבְרִיחוּ אֶת־יוֹשְׁבֵי גַת׃
englishText: and Beriah, and Shema, who were heads of fathers’houses of the inhabitants of Aijalon, who put to flight the inhabitants of Gath.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וְאַחְיוֹ שָׁשָׁק וִירֵמוֹת׃
englishText: And Ahio, Shashak, and Jeremoth;
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וּזְבַדְיָה וַעֲרָד וָעָדֶר׃
englishText: and Zebadiah, and Arad, and Eder;
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וּמִיכָאֵל וְיִשְׁפָּה וְיוֹחָא בְּנֵי בְרִיעָה׃
englishText: and Michael, and Ishpah, and Joha, were the sons of Beriah.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וּזְבַדְיָה וּמְשֻׁלָּם וְחִזְקִי וָחָבֶר׃
englishText: And Zebadiah, and Meshullam, and Hizki, and Heber;
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וְיִשְׁמְרַי וְיִזְלִיאָה וְיוֹבָב בְּנֵי אֶלְפָּעַל׃
englishText: and Ishmerai, and Izliah, and Jobab, were the sons of Elpaal.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וְיָקִים וְזִכְרִי וְזַבְדִּי׃
englishText: And Jakim, and Zichri, and Zabdi;
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וֶאֱלִיעֵנַי וְצִלְּתַי וֶאֱלִיאֵל׃
englishText: and Elienai, and Zillethai, and Eliel;
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וַעֲדָיָה וּבְרָאיָה וְשִׁמְרָת בְּנֵי שִׁמְעִי׃
englishText: and Adaiah, and Beraiah, and Shimrath, were the sons of Shimei.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וְיִשְׁפָּן וָעֵבֶר וֶאֱלִיאֵל׃
englishText: And Ishpan, and Ebed, and Eliel;
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וְעַבְדּוֹן וְזִכְרִי וְחָנָן׃
englishText: and Abdon, and Zichri, and Hanan;
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וַחֲנַנְיָה וְעֵילָם וְעַנְתֹתִיָּה׃
englishText: and Hananiah, and Elam, and Anthothiah;
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וְיִפְדְיָה ופניאל [וּפְנוּאֵל] בְּנֵי שָׁשָׁק׃
englishText: and Iphdeiah, and Penuel, were the sons of Shashak.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וְשַׁמְשְׁרַי וּשְׁחַרְיָה וַעֲתַלְיָה׃
englishText: And Shamsherai, and Shehariah, and Athaliah;
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וְיַעֲרֶשְׁיָה וְאֵלִיָּה וְזִכְרִי בְּנֵי יְרֹחָם׃
englishText: and Jaareshiah, and Elijah, and Zichri, were the sons of Jeroham.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: אֵלֶּה רָאשֵׁי אָבוֹת לְתֹלְדוֹתָם רָאשִׁים אֵלֶּה יָשְׁבוּ בִירוּשָׁלִָם׃
englishText: These were heads of fathers’houses throughout their generations, chief men; these dwelt in Jerusalem.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וּבְגִבְעוֹן יָשְׁבוּ אֲבִי גִבְעוֹן וְשֵׁם אִשְׁתּוֹ מַעֲכָה׃
englishText: And in Gibeon there dwelt the father of Gibeon [, Jeiel], whose wife’s name was Maacah;
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וּבְנוֹ הַבְּכוֹר עַבְדּוֹן וְצוּר וְקִישׁ וּבַעַל וְנָדָב׃
englishText: and his first-born son Abdon, and Zur, and Kish, and Baal, and Nadab;
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וּגְדוֹר וְאַחְיוֹ וָזָכֶר׃
englishText: and Gedor, and Ahio, and Zecher.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וּמִקְלוֹת הוֹלִיד אֶת־שִׁמְאָה וְאַף־הֵמָּה נֶגֶד אֲחֵיהֶם יָשְׁבוּ בִירוּשָׁלִַם עִם־אֲחֵיהֶם׃
englishText: And Mikloth begot Shimeah. And they also dwelt with their brethren in Jerusalem, over against their brethren.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וְנֵר הוֹלִיד אֶת־קִישׁ וְקִישׁ הוֹלִיד אֶת־שָׁאוּל וְשָׁאוּל הוֹלִיד אֶת־יְהוֹנָתָן וְאֶת־מַלְכִּי־שׁוּעַ וְאֶת־אֲבִינָדָב וְאֶת־אֶשְׁבָּעַל׃
englishText: And Ner begot Kish; and Kish begot Saul; and Saul begot Jonathan, and Malchi-shua, and Abinadab, and Eshbaal.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וּבֶן־יְהוֹנָתָן מְרִיב בָּעַל וּמְרִיב בַּעַל הוֹלִיד אֶת־מִיכָה׃
englishText: And the son of Jonathan was Merib-baal; and Merib-baal begot Micah.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וּבְנֵי מִיכָה פִּיתוֹן וָמֶלֶךְ וְתַאְרֵעַ וְאָחָז׃
englishText: And the sons of Micah; Pithon, and Melech, and Taarea, and Ahaz.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וְאָחָז הוֹלִיד אֶת־יְהוֹעַדָּה וִיהוֹעַדָּה הוֹלִיד אֶת־עָלֶמֶת וְאֶת־עַזְמָוֶת וְאֶת־זִמְרִי וְזִמְרִי הוֹלִיד אֶת־מוֹצָא׃
englishText: And Ahaz begot Jehoaddah; and Jehoaddah begot Alemeth, and Azmaveth, and Zimri; and Zimri begot Moza;
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וּמוֹצָא הוֹלִיד אֶת־בִּנְעָא רָפָה בְנוֹ אֶלְעָשָׂה בְנוֹ אָצֵל בְּנוֹ׃
englishText: and Moza begot Binea; Raphah was his son, Eleasah his son, Azel his son.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וּלְאָצֵל שִׁשָּׁה בָנִים וְאֵלֶּה שְׁמוֹתָם עַזְרִיקָם בֹּכְרוּ וְיִשְׁמָעֵאל וּשְׁעַרְיָה וְעֹבַדְיָה וְחָנָן כָּל־אֵלֶּה בְּנֵי אָצַל׃
englishText: And Azel had six sons, whose names are these: Azrikam, Bocru, and Ishmael, and Sheariah, and Obadiah, and Hanan. All these were the sons of Azel.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וּבְנֵי עֵשֶׁק אָחִיו אוּלָם בְּכֹרוֹ יְעוּשׁ הַשֵּׁנִי וֶאֱלִיפֶלֶט הַשְּׁלִשִׁי׃
englishText: And the sons of Eshek his brother: Ulam his firstborn, Jeush the second, and Eliphelet the third.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וַיִּהְיוּ בְנֵי־אוּלָם אֲנָשִׁים גִּבֹּרֵי־חַיִל דֹּרְכֵי קֶשֶׁת וּמַרְבִּים בָּנִים וּבְנֵי בָנִים מֵאָה וַחֲמִשִּׁים כָּל־אֵלֶּה מִבְּנֵי בִנְיָמִן׃
englishText: And the sons of Ulam were mighty men of valour, archers; and had many sons, and sons’sons, a hundred and fifty. All these were of the sons of Benjamin.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וְכָל־יִשְׂרָאֵל הִתְיַחְשׂוּ וְהִנָּם כְּתוּבִים עַל־סֵפֶר מַלְכֵי יִשְׂרָאֵל וִיהוּדָה הָגְלוּ לְבָבֶל בְּמַעֲלָם׃
englishText: So all Israel were reckoned by genealogies; and, behold, they are written in the book of the kings of Israel; and Judah was carried away captive to Babylon because of their transgression.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וְהַיּוֹשְׁבִים הָרִאשֹׁנִים אֲשֶׁר בַּאֲחֻזָּתָם בְּעָרֵיהֶם יִשְׂרָאֵל הַכֹּהֲנִים הַלְוִיִּם וְהַנְּתִינִים׃
englishText: Now the first inhabitants that dwelt in their possessions in their cities were, Israelites, the priests, the Levites, and the Nethinim.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וּבִירוּשָׁלִַם יָשְׁבוּ מִן־בְּנֵי יְהוּדָה וּמִן־בְּנֵי בִנְיָמִן וּמִן־בְּנֵי אֶפְרַיִם וּמְנַשֶּׁה׃
englishText: And in Jerusalem dwelt of the children of Judah, and of the children of Benjamin, and of the children of Ephraim and Manasseh:
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: עוּתַי בֶּן־עַמִּיהוּד בֶּן־עָמְרִי בֶּן־אִמְרִי בֶן־בנימן־[בָּנִי] [מִן־] בְּנֵי־פֶרֶץ בֶּן־יְהוּדָה׃
englishText: Uthai the son of Ammihud, the son of Omri, the son of Imri, the son of Bani, of the children of Perez the son of Judah.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וּמִן־הַשִּׁילוֹנִי עֲשָׂיָה הַבְּכוֹר וּבָנָיו׃
englishText: And of the Shilonites: Asaiah the first-born and his sons.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וּמִן־בְּנֵי־זֶרַח יְעוּאֵל וַאֲחֵיהֶם שֵׁשׁ־מֵאוֹת וְתִשְׁעִים׃
englishText: And of the sons of Zerah: Jeuel, and their brethren, six hundred and ninety.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וּמִן־בְּנֵי בִּנְיָמִן סַלּוּא בֶּן־מְשֻׁלָּם בֶּן־הוֹדַוְיָה בֶּן־הַסְּנֻאָה׃
englishText: And of the sons of Benjamin: Sallu the son of Meshullam, the son of Hodaviah, the son of Hassenuah,
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וְיִבְנְיָה בֶּן־יְרֹחָם וְאֵלָה בֶן־עֻזִּי בֶּן־מִכְרִי וּמְשֻׁלָּם בֶּן־שְׁפַטְיָה בֶּן־רְעוּאֵל בֶּן־יִבְנִיָּה׃
englishText: and Ibneiah the son of Jeroham, and Elah the son of Uzzi, the son of Michri, and Meshullam the son of Shephatiah, the son of Reuel, the son of Ibneiah;
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וַאֲחֵיהֶם לְתֹלְדוֹתָם תְּשַׁע מֵאוֹת וַחֲמִשִּׁים וְשִׁשָּׁה כָּל־אֵלֶּה אֲנָשִׁים רָאשֵׁי אָבוֹת לְבֵית אֲבֹתֵיהֶם׃
englishText: and their brethren, according to their generations, nine hundred and fifty and six. All these men were heads of fathers’houses by their fathers’houses.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וּמִן־הַכֹּהֲנִים יְדַעְיָה וִיהוֹיָרִיב וְיָכִין׃
englishText: And of the priests: Jedaiah, and Jehoiarib, and Jachin;
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וַעֲזַרְיָה בֶן־חִלְקִיָּה בֶּן־מְשֻׁלָּם בֶּן־צָדוֹק בֶּן־מְרָיוֹת בֶּן־אֲחִיטוּב נְגִיד בֵּית הָאֱלֹהִים׃
englishText: and Azariah the son of Hilkiah, the son of Meshullam, the son of Zadok, the son of Meraioth, the son of Ahitub, the ruler of the house of God;
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וַעֲדָיָה בֶּן־יְרֹחָם בֶּן־פַּשְׁחוּר בֶּן־מַלְכִּיָּה וּמַעְשַׂי בֶּן־עֲדִיאֵל בֶּן־יַחְזֵרָה בֶּן־מְשֻׁלָּם בֶּן־מְשִׁלֵּמִית בֶּן־אִמֵּר׃
englishText: and Adaiah the son of Jeroham, the son of Pashhur, the son of Malchijah, and Maasai the son of Adiel, the son of Jahzerah, the son of Meshullam, the son of Meshillemith, the son of Immer;
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וַאֲחֵיהֶם רָאשִׁים לְבֵית אֲבוֹתָם אֶלֶף וּשְׁבַע מֵאוֹת וְשִׁשִּׁים גִּבּוֹרֵי חֵיל מְלֶאכֶת עֲבוֹדַת בֵּית־הָאֱלֹהִים׃
englishText: and their brethren, heads of their fathers’houses, a thousand and seven hundred and threescore; very able men for the work of the service of the house of God.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וּמִן־הַלְוִיִּם שְׁמַעְיָה בֶן־חַשּׁוּב בֶּן־עַזְרִיקָם בֶּן־חֲשַׁבְיָה מִן־בְּנֵי מְרָרִי׃
englishText: And of the Levites: Shemaiah the son of Hasshub, the son of Azrikam, the son of Hashabiah, of the sons of Merari;
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וּבַקְבַּקַּר חֶרֶשׁ וְגָלָל וּמַתַּנְיָה בֶּן־מִיכָא בֶּן־זִכְרִי בֶּן־אָסָף׃
englishText: and Bakbakkar, Heresh, and Galal, and Mattaniah the son of Mica, the son of Zichri, the son of Asaph;
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וְעֹבַדְיָה בֶּן־שְׁמַעְיָה בֶּן־גָּלָל בֶּן־יְדוּתוּן וּבֶרֶכְיָה בֶן־אָסָא בֶּן־אֶלְקָנָה הַיּוֹשֵׁב בְּחַצְרֵי נְטוֹפָתִי׃
englishText: and Obadiah the son of Shemaiah, the son of Galal, the son of Jeduthun, and Berechiah the son of Asa, the son of Elkanah, that dwelt in the villages of the Netophathites. .
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וְהַשֹּׁעֲרִים שַׁלּוּם וְעַקּוּב וְטַלְמֹן וַאֲחִימָן וַאֲחִיהֶם שַׁלּוּם הָרֹאשׁ׃
englishText: And the porters: Shallum, and Akkub, and Talmon, and Ahiman, and their brother Shallum the chief;
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וְעַד־הֵנָּה בְּשַׁעַר הַמֶּלֶךְ מִזְרָחָה הֵמָּה הַשֹּׁעֲרִים לְמַחֲנוֹת בְּנֵי לֵוִי׃
englishText: who hitherto waited in the king’s gate eastward; they were the porters for the camp of the children of Levi.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וְשַׁלּוּם בֶּן־קוֹרֵא בֶּן־אֶבְיָסָף בֶּן־קֹרַח וְאֶחָיו לְבֵית־אָבִיו הַקָּרְחִים עַל מְלֶאכֶת הָעֲבוֹדָה שֹׁמְרֵי הַסִּפִּים לָאֹהֶל וַאֲבֹתֵיהֶם עַל־מַחֲנֵה יְהוָה שֹׁמְרֵי הַמָּבוֹא׃
englishText: And Shallum the son of Kore, the son of Ebiasaph, the son of Korah, and his brethren, of his father’s house, the Korahites, were over the work of the service, keepers of the gates of the Tent; and their fathers had been over the camp of the LORD, keepers of the entry;
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וּפִינְחָס בֶּן־אֶלְעָזָר נָגִיד הָיָה עֲלֵיהֶם לְפָנִים יְהוָה עִמּוֹ׃
englishText: and Phinehas the son of Eleazar was ruler over them in time past, the LORD being with him.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: זְכַרְיָה בֶּן מְשֶׁלֶמְיָה שֹׁעֵר פֶּתַח לְאֹהֶל מוֹעֵד׃
englishText: Zechariah the son of Meshelemiah was porter of the door of the tent of meeting.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: כֻּלָּם הַבְּרוּרִים לְשֹׁעֲרִים בַּסִּפִּים מָאתַיִם וּשְׁנֵים עָשָׂר הֵמָּה בְחַצְרֵיהֶם הִתְיַחְשָׂם הֵמָּה יִסַּד דָּוִיד וּשְׁמוּאֵל הָרֹאֶה בֶּאֱמוּנָתָם׃
englishText: All these that were chosen to be porters in the gates were two hundred and twelve. These were reckoned by genealogy in their villages, whom David and Samuel the seer did ordain in their set office.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וְהֵם וּבְנֵיהֶם עַל־הַשְּׁעָרִים לְבֵית־יְהוָה לְבֵית־הָאֹהֶל לְמִשְׁמָרוֹת׃
englishText: So they and their children had the oversight of the gates of the house of the LORD, even the house of the Tent, by wards.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: לְאַרְבַּע רוּחוֹת יִהְיוּ הַשֹּׁעֲרִים מִזְרָח יָמָּה צָפוֹנָה וָנֶגְבָּה׃
englishText: On the four sides were the porters, toward the east, west, north, and south.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וַאֲחֵיהֶם בְּחַצְרֵיהֶם לָבוֹא לְשִׁבְעַת הַיָּמִים מֵעֵת אֶל־עֵת עִם־אֵלֶּה׃
englishText: And their brethren, in their villages, were to come in every seven days from time to time to be with them;
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: כִּי בֶאֱמוּנָה הֵמָּה אַרְבַּעַת גִּבֹּרֵי הַשֹּׁעֲרִים הֵם הַלְוִיִּם וְהָיוּ עַל־הַלְּשָׁכוֹת וְעַל הָאֹצְרוֹת בֵּית הָאֱלֹהִים׃
englishText: for the four chief porters were in a set office. These were the Levites. They were also over the chambers and over the treasuries in the house of God.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וּסְבִיבוֹת בֵּית־הָאֱלֹהִים יָלִינוּ כִּי־עֲלֵיהֶם מִשְׁמֶרֶת וְהֵם עַל־הַמַּפְתֵּחַ וְלַבֹּקֶר לַבֹּקֶר׃
englishText: And they lodged round about the house of God, because the charge thereof was upon them, and to them pertained the opening thereof morning by morning.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וּמֵהֶם עַל־כְּלֵי הָעֲבוֹדָה כִּי־בְמִסְפָּר יְבִיאוּם וּבְמִסְפָּר יוֹצִיאוּם׃
englishText: And certain of them had charge of the vessels of service; for by tale were they brought in and by tale were they taken out.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וּמֵהֶם מְמֻנִּים עַל־הַכֵּלִים וְעַל כָּל־כְּלֵי הַקֹּדֶשׁ וְעַל־הַסֹּלֶת וְהַיַּיִן וְהַשֶּׁמֶן וְהַלְּבוֹנָה וְהַבְּשָׂמִים׃
englishText: Some of them also were appointed over the furniture, and over all the holy vessels, and over the fine flour, and the wine, and the oil, and the frankincense, and the spices.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וּמִן־בְּנֵי הַכֹּהֲנִים רֹקְחֵי הַמִּרְקַחַת לַבְּשָׂמִים׃
englishText: And some of the sons of the priests prepared the confection of the spices.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וּמַתִּתְיָה מִן־הַלְוִיִּם הוּא הַבְּכוֹר לְשַׁלֻּם הַקָּרְחִי בֶּאֱמוּנָה עַל מַעֲשֵׂה הַחֲבִתִּים׃
englishText: And Mattithiah, one of the Levites, who was the firstborn of Shallum the Korahite, had the set office over the things that were baked on griddles.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וּמִן־בְּנֵי הַקְּהָתִי מִן־אֲחֵיהֶם עַל־לֶחֶם הַמַּעֲרָכֶת לְהָכִין שַׁבַּת שַׁבָּת׃
englishText: And some of their brethren, of the sons of the Kohathites, were over the showbread, to prepare it every sabbath.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וְאֵלֶּה הַמְשֹׁרְרִים רָאשֵׁי אָבוֹת לַלְוִיִּם בַּלְּשָׁכֹת פטירים [פְּטוּרִים] כִּי־יוֹמָם וָלַיְלָה עֲלֵיהֶם בַּמְּלָאכָה׃
englishText: And these are the singers, heads of fathers’houses of the Levites, who dwelt in the chambers and were free from other service; for they were employed in their work day and night.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: אֵלֶּה רָאשֵׁי הָאָבוֹת לַלְוִיִּם לְתֹלְדוֹתָם רָאשִׁים אֵלֶּה יָשְׁבוּ בִירוּשָׁלִָם׃
englishText: These were heads of fathers’houses of the Levites, by their generations, chief men; these dwelt at Jerusalem.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וּבְגִבְעוֹן יָשְׁבוּ אֲבִי־גִבְעוֹן יעואל [יְעִיאֵל] וְשֵׁם אִשְׁתּוֹ מַעֲכָה׃
englishText: And in Gibeon there dwelt the father of Gibeon, Jeiel, whose wife’s name was Maacah;
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וּבְנוֹ הַבְּכוֹר עַבְדּוֹן וְצוּר וְקִישׁ וּבַעַל וְנֵר וְנָדָב׃
englishText: and his first-born son Abdon, and Zur, and Kish, and Baal, and Ner, and Nadab;
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וּגְדוֹר וְאַחְיוֹ וּזְכַרְיָה וּמִקְלוֹת׃
englishText: and Gedor, and Ahio, and Zechariah, and Mikloth.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וּמִקְלוֹת הוֹלִיד אֶת־שִׁמְאָם וְאַף־הֵם נֶגֶד אֲחֵיהֶם יָשְׁבוּ בִירוּשָׁלִַם עִם־אֲחֵיהֶם׃
englishText: And Mikloth begot Shimeam. And they also dwelt with their brethren in Jerusalem, over against their brethren. .
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וְנֵר הוֹלִיד אֶת־קִישׁ וְקִישׁ הוֹלִיד אֶת־שָׁאוּל וְשָׁאוּל הוֹלִיד אֶת־יְהוֹנָתָן וְאֶת־מַלְכִּי־שׁוּעַ וְאֶת־אֲבִינָדָב וְאֶת־אֶשְׁבָּעַל׃
englishText: And Ner begot Kish; and Kish begot Saul; and Saul begot Jonathan, and Malchi-shua, and Abinadab, and Eshbaal.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וּבֶן־יְהוֹנָתָן מְרִיב בָּעַל וּמְרִי־בַעַל הוֹלִיד אֶת־מִיכָה׃
englishText: And the son of Jonathan was Merib-baal; and Merib-baal begot Micah.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וּבְנֵי מִיכָה פִּיתוֹן וָמֶלֶךְ וְתַחְרֵעַ׃
englishText: And the sons of Micah: Pithon, and Melech, and Taharea[,band Ahaz].
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וְאָחָז הוֹלִיד אֶת־יַעְרָה וְיַעְרָה הוֹלִיד אֶת־עָלֶמֶת וְאֶת־עַזְמָוֶת וְאֶת־זִמְרִי וְזִמְרִי הוֹלִיד אֶת־מוֹצָא׃
englishText: And Ahaz begot Jarah; and Jarah begot Alemeth, and Azmaveth, and Zimri; and Zimri begot Moza.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וּמוֹצָא הוֹלִיד אֶת־בִּנְעָא וּרְפָיָה בְנוֹ אֶלְעָשָׂה בְנוֹ אָצֵל בְּנוֹ׃
englishText: And Moza begot Binea; and Rephaiah his son, Eleasah his son, Azel his son.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וּלְאָצֵל שִׁשָּׁה בָנִים וְאֵלֶּה שְׁמוֹתָם עַזְרִיקָם בֹּכְרוּ וְיִשְׁמָעֵאל וּשְׁעַרְיָה וְעֹבַדְיָה וְחָנָן אֵלֶּה בְּנֵי אָצַל׃
englishText: And Azel had six sons, whose names are these: Azrikam, Bocru, and Ishmael, and Sheariah, and Obadiah, and Hanan; these were the sons of Azel.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וּפְלִשְׁתִּים נִלְחֲמוּ בְיִשְׂרָאֵל וַיָּנָס אִישׁ־יִשְׂרָאֵל מִפְּנֵי פְלִשְׁתִּים וַיִּפְּלוּ חֲלָלִים בְּהַר גִּלְבֹּעַ׃
englishText: Now the Philistines fought against Israel; and the men of Israel fled from before the Philistines, and fell down slain in mount Gilboa.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וַיַּדְבְּקוּ פְלִשְׁתִּים אַחֲרֵי שָׁאוּל וְאַחֲרֵי בָנָיו וַיַּכּוּ פְלִשְׁתִּים אֶת־יוֹנָתָן וְאֶת־אֲבִינָדָב וְאֶת־מַלְכִּי־שׁוּעַ בְּנֵי שָׁאוּל׃
englishText: And the Philistines followed hard after Saul and after his sons; and the Philistines slew Jonathan, and Abinadab, and Malchi-shua, the sons of Saul.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וַתִּכְבַּד הַמִּלְחָמָה עַל־שָׁאוּל וַיִּמְצָאֻהוּ הַמּוֹרִים בַּקָּשֶׁת וַיָּחֶל מִן־הַיּוֹרִים׃
englishText: And the battle went sore against Saul, and the archers overtook him; and he was in anguish by reason of the archers.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וַיֹּאמֶר שָׁאוּל אֶל־נֹשֵׂא כֵלָיו שְׁלֹף חַרְבְּךָ וְדָקְרֵנִי בָהּ פֶּן־יָבֹאוּ הָעֲרֵלִים הָאֵלֶּה וְהִתְעַלְּלוּ־בִי וְלֹא אָבָה נֹשֵׂא כֵלָיו כִּי יָרֵא מְאֹד וַיִּקַּח שָׁאוּל אֶת־הַחֶרֶב וַיִּפֹּל עָלֶיהָ׃
englishText: Then said Saul unto his armour-bearer: ‘Draw thy sword, and thrust me through therewith; lest these uncircumcised come and make a mock of me.’ But his armour-bearer would not; for he was sore afraid. Therefore Saul took his sword, and fell upon it.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וַיַּרְא נֹשֵׂא־כֵלָיו כִּי מֵת שָׁאוּל וַיִּפֹּל גַּם־הוּא עַל־הַחֶרֶב וַיָּמֹת׃
englishText: And when his armour-bearer saw that Saul was dead, he likewise fell upon his sword, and died.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וַיָּמָת שָׁאוּל וּשְׁלֹשֶׁת בָּנָיו וְכָל־בֵּיתוֹ יַחְדָּו מֵתוּ׃
englishText: So Saul died, and his three sons; and all his house died together.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וַיִּרְאוּ כָּל־אִישׁ יִשְׂרָאֵל אֲשֶׁר־בָּעֵמֶק כִּי נָסוּ וְכִי־מֵתוּ שָׁאוּל וּבָנָיו וַיַּעַזְבוּ עָרֵיהֶם וַיָּנֻסוּ וַיָּבֹאוּ פְלִשְׁתִּים וַיֵּשְׁבוּ בָּהֶם׃
englishText: And when all the men of Israel that were in the valley saw that [Israel] fled, and that Saul and his sons were dead, they forsook their cities, and fled; and the Philistines came and dwelt in them.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וַיְהִי מִמָּחֳרָת וַיָּבֹאוּ פְלִשְׁתִּים לְפַשֵּׁט אֶת־הַחֲלָלִים וַיִּמְצְאוּ אֶת־שָׁאוּל וְאֶת־בָּנָיו נֹפְלִים בְּהַר גִּלְבֹּעַ׃
englishText: And it came to pass on the morrow, when the Philistines came to strip the slain, that they found Saul and his sons fallen in mount Gilboa.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וַיַּפְשִׁיטֻהוּ וַיִּשְׂאוּ אֶת־רֹאשׁוֹ וְאֶת־כֵּלָיו וַיְשַׁלְּחוּ בְאֶרֶץ־פְלִשְׁתִּים סָבִיב לְבַשֵּׂר אֶת־עֲצַבֵּיהֶם וְאֶת־הָעָם׃
englishText: And they stripped him, and took his head, and his armour, and sent into the land of the Philistines round about, to carry the tidings unto their idols, and to the people.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וַיָּשִׂימוּ אֶת־כֵּלָיו בֵּית אֱלֹהֵיהֶם וְאֶת־גֻּלְגָּלְתּוֹ תָקְעוּ בֵּית דָּגוֹן׃
englishText: And they put his armour in the house of their gods, and fastened his head in the house of Dagon.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וַיִּשְׁמְעוּ כֹּל יָבֵישׁ גִּלְעָד אֵת כָּל־אֲשֶׁר־עָשׂוּ פְלִשְׁתִּים לְשָׁאוּל׃
englishText: And when all Jabesh-gilead heard all that the Philistines had done to Saul,
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וַיָּקוּמוּ כָּל־אִישׁ חַיִל וַיִּשְׂאוּ אֶת־גּוּפַת שָׁאוּל וְאֵת גּוּפֹת בָּנָיו וַיְבִיאוּם יָבֵישָׁה וַיִּקְבְּרוּ אֶת־עַצְמוֹתֵיהֶם תַּחַת הָאֵלָה בְּיָבֵשׁ וַיָּצוּמוּ שִׁבְעַת יָמִים׃
englishText: all the valiant men arose, and took away the body of Saul, and the bodies of his sons, and brought them to Jabesh, and buried their bones under the terebinth in Jabesh, and fasted seven days.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וַיָּמָת שָׁאוּל בְּמַעֲלוֹ אֲשֶׁר מָעַל בַּיהוָה עַל־דְּבַר יְהוָה אֲשֶׁר לֹא־שָׁמָר וְגַם־לִשְׁאוֹל בָּאוֹב לִדְרוֹשׁ׃
englishText: So Saul died for his transgression which he committed against the LORD, because of the word of the LORD, which he kept not; and also for that he asked counsel of a ghost, to inquire thereby,
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וְלֹא־דָרַשׁ בַּיהוָה וַיְמִיתֵהוּ וַיַּסֵּב אֶת־הַמְּלוּכָה לְדָוִיד בֶּן־יִשָׁי׃
englishText: and inquired not of the LORD; therefore He slew him, and turned the kingdom unto David the son of Jesse.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וַיִּקָּבְצוּ כָל־יִשְׂרָאֵל אֶל־דָּוִיד חֶבְרוֹנָה לֵאמֹר הִנֵּה עַצְמְךָ וּבְשָׂרְךָ אֲנָחְנוּ׃
englishText: Then all Israel gathered themselves to David unto Hebron, saying: ‘Behold, we are thy bone and thy flesh.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: גַּם־תְּמוֹל גַּם־שִׁלְשׁוֹם גַּם בִּהְיוֹת שָׁאוּל מֶלֶךְ אַתָּה הַמּוֹצִיא וְהַמֵּבִיא אֶת־יִשְׂרָאֵל וַיֹּאמֶר יְהוָה אֱלֹהֶיךָ לְךָ אַתָּה תִרְעֶה אֶת־עַמִּי אֶת־יִשְׂרָאֵל וְאַתָּה תִּהְיֶה נָגִיד עַל עַמִּי יִשְׂרָאֵל׃
englishText: In times past, even when Saul was king, it was thou that didst lead out and bring in Israel; and the LORD thy God said unto thee: Thou shalt feed My people Israel, and thou shalt be prince over My people Israel.’
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וַיָּבֹאוּ כָּל־זִקְנֵי יִשְׂרָאֵל אֶל־הַמֶּלֶךְ חֶבְרוֹנָה וַיִּכְרֹת לָהֶם דָּוִיד בְּרִית בְּחֶבְרוֹן לִפְנֵי יְהוָה וַיִּמְשְׁחוּ אֶת־דָּוִיד לְמֶלֶךְ עַל־יִשְׂרָאֵל כִּדְבַר יְהוָה בְּיַד־שְׁמוּאֵל׃
englishText: So all the elders of Israel came to the king to Hebron; and David made a covenant with them in Hebron before the LORD; and they anointed David king over Israel, according to the word of the LORD by the hand of Samuel.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וַיֵּלֶךְ דָּוִיד וְכָל־יִשְׂרָאֵל יְרוּשָׁלִַם הִיא יְבוּס וְשָׁם הַיְבוּסִי יֹשְׁבֵי הָאָרֶץ׃
englishText: And David and all Israel went to Jerusalem—the same is Jebus—and the Jebusites, the inhabitants of the land, were there.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וַיֹּאמְרוּ יֹשְׁבֵי יְבוּס לְדָוִיד לֹא תָבוֹא הֵנָּה וַיִּלְכֹּד דָּוִיד אֶת־מְצֻדַת צִיּוֹן הִיא עִיר דָּוִיד׃
englishText: And the inhabitants of Jebus said to David: ‘Thou shalt not come in hither.’ Nevertheless David took the stronghold of Zion; the same is the city of David.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וַיֹּאמֶר דָּוִיד כָּל־מַכֵּה יְבוּסִי בָּרִאשׁוֹנָה יִהְיֶה לְרֹאשׁ וּלְשָׂר וַיַּעַל בָּרִאשׁוֹנָה יוֹאָב בֶּן־צְרוּיָה וַיְהִי לְרֹאשׁ׃
englishText: And David said: ‘Whosoever smiteth the Jebusites first shall be chief and captain.’ And Joab the son of Zeruiah went up first, and was made chief.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וַיֵּשֶׁב דָּוִיד בַּמְצָד עַל־כֵּן קָרְאוּ־לוֹ עִיר דָּוִיד׃
englishText: And David dwelt in the stronghold; therefore they called it the city of David.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וַיִּבֶן הָעִיר מִסָּבִיב מִן־הַמִּלּוֹא וְעַד־הַסָּבִיב וְיוֹאָב יְחַיֶּה אֶת־שְׁאָר הָעִיר׃
englishText: And he built the city round about, from Millo even round about; and Joab repaired the rest of the city.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וַיֵּלֶךְ דָּוִיד הָלוֹךְ וְגָדוֹל וַיהוָה צְבָאוֹת עִמּוֹ׃
englishText: And David waxed greater and greater; for the LORD of hosts was with him.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וְאֵלֶּה רָאשֵׁי הַגִּבּוֹרִים אֲשֶׁר לְדָוִיד הַמִּתְחַזְּקִים עִמּוֹ בְמַלְכוּתוֹ עִם־כָּל־יִשְׂרָאֵל לְהַמְלִיכוֹ כִּדְבַר יְהוָה עַל־יִשְׂרָאֵל׃
englishText: Now these are the chief of the mighty men whom David had, who held strongly with him in his kingdom, together with all Israel, to make him king, according to the word of the LORD concerning Israel.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וְאֵלֶּה מִסְפַּר הַגִּבֹּרִים אֲשֶׁר לְדָוִיד יָשָׁבְעָם בֶּן־חַכְמוֹנִי רֹאשׁ השלושים [הַשָּׁלִישִׁים] הוּא־עוֹרֵר אֶת־חֲנִיתוֹ עַל־שְׁלֹשׁ־מֵאוֹת חָלָל בְּפַעַם אֶחָת׃
englishText: And this is the number of the mighty men whom David had: Jashobeam, the son of a Hachmonite, the chief of the captains; he lifted up his spear against three hundred and slew them at one time.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וְאַחֲרָיו אֶלְעָזָר בֶּן־דּוֹדוֹ הָאֲחוֹחִי הוּא בִּשְׁלוֹשָׁה הַגִּבֹּרִים׃
englishText: And after him was Eleazar the son of Dodo, the Ahohite, who was one of the three mighty men.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: הוּא־הָיָה עִם־דָּוִיד בַּפַּס דַּמִּים וְהַפְּלִשְׁתִּים נֶאֱסְפוּ־שָׁם לַמִּלְחָמָה וַתְּהִי חֶלְקַת הַשָּׂדֶה מְלֵאָה שְׂעוֹרִים וְהָעָם נָסוּ מִפְּנֵי פְלִשְׁתִּים׃
englishText: He was with David at Pas-dammim, and there the Philistines were gathered together to battle, where was a plot of ground full of barley; and the people fled from before the Philistines.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וַיִּתְיַצְּבוּ בְתוֹךְ־הַחֶלְקָה וַיַּצִּילוּהָ וַיַּכּוּ אֶת־פְּלִשְׁתִּים וַיּוֹשַׁע יְהוָה תְּשׁוּעָה גְדוֹלָה׃
englishText: But they stood in the midst of the plot, and defended it, and slew the Philistines; and the LORD saved them by a great victory.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וַיֵּרְדוּ שְׁלוֹשָׁה מִן־הַשְּׁלוֹשִׁים רֹאשׁ עַל־הַצֻּר אֶל־דָּוִיד אֶל־מְעָרַת עֲדֻלָּם וּמַחֲנֵה פְלִשְׁתִּים חֹנָה בְּעֵמֶק רְפָאִים׃
englishText: And three of the thirty chiefs went down to the rock to David, unto the cave of Adullam; and the host of the Philistines were encamped in the valley of Rephaim.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וְדָוִיד אָז בַּמְּצוּדָה וּנְצִיב פְּלִשְׁתִּים אָז בְּבֵית לָחֶם׃
englishText: And David was then in the stronghold, and the garrison of the Philistines was then in Beth-lehem.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: ויתאו [וַיִּתְאָיו] דָּוִיד וַיֹּאמַר מִי יַשְׁקֵנִי מַיִם מִבּוֹר בֵּית־לֶחֶם אֲשֶׁר בַּשָּׁעַר׃
englishText: And David longed, and said: ‘Oh that one would give me water to drink of the well of Beth-lehem, which is by the gate! ’
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וַיִּבְקְעוּ הַשְּׁלֹשָׁה בְּמַחֲנֵה פְלִשְׁתִּים וַיִּשְׁאֲבוּ־מַיִם מִבּוֹר בֵּית־לֶחֶם אֲשֶׁר בַּשַּׁעַר וַיִּשְׂאוּ וַיָּבִאוּ אֶל־דָּוִיד וְלֹא־אָבָה דָוִיד לִשְׁתּוֹתָם וַיְנַסֵּךְ אֹתָם לַיהוָה׃
englishText: And the three broke through the host of the Philistines, and drew water out of the well of Beth-lehem, that was by the gate, and took it, and brought it to David; but David would not drink thereof, but poured it out unto the LORD,
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וַיֹּאמֶר חָלִילָה לִּי מֵאֱלֹהַי מֵעֲשׂוֹת זֹאת הֲדַם הָאֲנָשִׁים הָאֵלֶּה אֶשְׁתֶּה בְנַפְשׁוֹתָם כִּי בְנַפְשׁוֹתָם הֱבִיאוּם וְלֹא אָבָה לִשְׁתּוֹתָם אֵלֶּה עָשׂוּ שְׁלֹשֶׁת הַגִּבּוֹרִים׃
englishText: and said: ‘My God forbid it me, that I should do this; shall I drink the blood of these men that have put their lives in jeopardy? for with the jeopardy of their lives they brought it.’ Therefore he would not drink it. These things did the three mighty men.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וְאַבְשַׁי אֲחִי־יוֹאָב הוּא הָיָה רֹאשׁ הַשְּׁלוֹשָׁה וְהוּא עוֹרֵר אֶת־חֲנִיתוֹ עַל־שְׁלֹשׁ מֵאוֹת חָלָל ולא־[וְלוֹ־] שֵׁם בַּשְּׁלוֹשָׁה׃
englishText: And Abishai, the brother of Joab, he was chief of the three; for he lifted up his spear against three hundred and slew them, and had a name among the three.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: מִן־הַשְּׁלוֹשָׁה בַשְּׁנַיִם נִכְבָּד וַיְהִי לָהֶם לְשָׂר וְעַד־הַשְּׁלוֹשָׁה לֹא־בָא׃
englishText: Of the three in the second rank he was the most honourable, and was made their captain; howbeit he attained not to the first three.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: בְּנָיָה בֶן־יְהוֹיָדָע בֶּן־אִישׁ־חַיִל רַב־פְּעָלִים מִן־קַבְצְאֵל הוּא הִכָּה אֵת שְׁנֵי אֲרִיאֵל מוֹאָב וְהוּא יָרַד וְהִכָּה אֶת־הָאֲרִי בְּתוֹךְ הַבּוֹר בְּיוֹם הַשָּׁלֶג׃
englishText: Beniah the son of Jehoiada, the son of a valiant man of Kabzeel, who had done mighty deeds, he smote the two altar-hearths of Moab; he went down also and slew a lion in the midst of a pit in time of snow.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וְהוּא־הִכָּה אֶת־הָאִישׁ הַמִּצְרִי אִישׁ מִדָּה חָמֵשׁ בָּאַמָּה וּבְיַד הַמִּצְרִי חֲנִית כִּמְנוֹר אֹרְגִים וַיֵּרֶד אֵלָיו בַּשָּׁבֶט וַיִּגְזֹל אֶת־הַחֲנִית מִיַּד הַמִּצְרִי וַיַּהַרְגֵהוּ בַּחֲנִיתוֹ׃
englishText: And he slew an Egyptian, a man of great stature, five cubits high; and in the Egyptian’s hand was a spear like a weaver’s beam; and he went down to him with a staff, and plucked the spear out of the Egyptian’s hand, and slew him with his own spear.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: אֵלֶּה עָשָׂה בְּנָיָהוּ בֶּן־יְהוֹיָדָע וְלוֹ־שֵׁם בִּשְׁלוֹשָׁה הַגִּבֹּרִים׃
englishText: These things did Benaiah the son of Jehoiada, and had a name among the three mighty men.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: מִן־הַשְּׁלוֹשִׁים הִנּוֹ נִכְבָּד הוּא וְאֶל־הַשְּׁלוֹשָׁה לֹא־בָא וַיְשִׂימֵהוּ דָוִיד עַל־מִשְׁמַעְתּוֹ׃
englishText: Behold, he was more honourable than the thirty, but he attained not to the first three; and David set him over his guard.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וְגִבּוֹרֵי הַחֲיָלִים עֲשָׂה־אֵל אֲחִי יוֹאָב אֶלְחָנָן בֶּן־דּוֹדוֹ מִבֵּית לָחֶם׃
englishText: Also the mighty men of valour: Asahel the brother of Joab, Elhanan the son of Dodo of Beth-lehem;
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: שַׁמּוֹת הַהֲרוֹרִי חֶלֶץ הַפְּלוֹנִי׃
englishText: Shammoth the Harorite, Helez the Pelonite;
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: עִירָא בֶן־עִקֵּשׁ הַתְּקוֹעִי אֲבִיעֶזֶר הָעֲנְּתוֹתִי׃
englishText: Ira the son of Ikkesh the Tekoite, Abiezer the Anathothite;
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: סִבְּכַי הַחֻשָׁתִי עִילַי הָאֲחוֹחִי׃
englishText: Sibbecai the Hushathite, Ilai the Ahohite;
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: מַהְרַי הַנְּטֹפָתִי חֵלֶד בֶּן־בַּעֲנָה הַנְּטוֹפָתִי׃
englishText: Mahrai the Netophathite, Heled the son of Baanah the Netophathite;
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: אִיתַי בֶּן־רִיבַי מִגִּבְעַת בְּנֵי בִנְיָמִן בְּנָיָה הַפִּרְעָתֹנִי׃
englishText: Ithai the son of Ribai of Gibeah of the children of Benjamin, Benaiah the Pirathonite;
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: חוּרַי מִנַּחֲלֵי גָעַשׁ אֲבִיאֵל הָעַרְבָתִי׃
englishText: Hurai of Nahale-gaash, Abiel the Arbathite;
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: עַזְמָוֶת הַבַּחֲרוּמִי אֶלְיַחְבָּא הַשַּׁעַלְבֹנִי׃
englishText: Azmaveth the Baharumite, Eliahba the Shaalbonite;
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: בְּנֵי הָשֵׁם הַגִּזוֹנִי יוֹנָתָן בֶּן־שָׁגֵה הַהֲרָרִי׃
englishText: the sons of Hashem the Gizonite, Jonathan the son of Shageh the Hararite;
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: אֲחִיאָם בֶּן־שָׂכָר הַהֲרָרִי אֱלִיפַל בֶּן־אוּר׃
englishText: Ahiam the son of Sacar the Hararite, Eliphal the son of Ur;
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: חֵפֶר הַמְּכֵרָתִי אֲחִיָּה הַפְּלֹנִי׃
englishText: Hepher the Mecherathite, Ahijah the Pelonite;
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: חֶצְרוֹ הַכַּרְמְלִי נַעֲרַי בֶּן־אֶזְבָּי׃
englishText: Hezro the Carmelite, Naarai the son of Ezbai;
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: יוֹאֵל אֲחִי נָתָן מִבְחָר בֶּן־הַגְרִי׃
englishText: Joel the brother of Nathan, Mibhar the son of Hagri;
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: צֶלֶק הָעַמּוֹנִי נַחְרַי הַבֵּרֹתִי נֹשֵׂא כְּלֵי יוֹאָב בֶּן־צְרוּיָה׃
englishText: Zelek the Ammonite, Nahrai the Berothite, the armour-bearer of Joab the son of Zeruiah;
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: עִירָא הַיִּתְרִי גָּרֵב הַיִּתְרִי׃
englishText: Ira the Ithrite, Gareb the Ithrite;
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: אוּרִיָּה הַחִתִּי זָבָד בֶּן־אַחְלָי׃
englishText: Uriah the Hittite, Zabad the son of Ahlai;
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: עֲדִינָא בֶן־שִׁיזָא הָראוּבֵנִי רֹאשׁ לָראוּבֵנִי וְעָלָיו שְׁלוֹשִׁים׃
englishText: Adina the son of Shiza the Reubenite, a chief of the Reubenites, and thirty with him;
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: חָנָן בֶּן־מַעֲכָה וְיוֹשָׁפָט הַמִּתְנִי׃
englishText: Hanan the son of Maacah, and Joshaphat the Mithnite;
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: עֻזִיָּא הָעֲשְׁתְּרָתִי שָׁמָע ויעואל [וִיעִיאֵל] בְּנֵי חוֹתָם הָעֲרֹעֵרִי׃
englishText: Uzzia the Ashterathite, Shama and Jeiel the sons of Hotham the Aroerite;
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: יְדִיעֲאֵל בֶּן־שִׁמְרִי וְיֹחָא אָחִיו הַתִּיצִי׃
englishText: Jediael the son of Shimri, and Joha his brother, the Tizite;
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: אֱלִיאֵל הַמַּחֲוִים וִירִיבַי וְיוֹשַׁוְיָה בְּנֵי אֶלְנָעַם וְיִתְמָה הַמּוֹאָבִי׃
englishText: Eliel the Mahavite, and Jeribai, and Joshaviah, the sons of Elnaam, and Ithmah the Moabite;
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: אֱלִיאֵל וְעוֹבֵד וְיַעֲשִׂיאֵל הַמְּצֹבָיָה׃
englishText: Eliel, and Obed, and Jaasiel the Mezobaite.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וְאֵלֶּה הַבָּאִים אֶל־דָּוִיד לְצִיקְלַג עוֹד עָצוּר מִפְּנֵי שָׁאוּל בֶּן־קִישׁ וְהֵמָּה בַּגִּבּוֹרִים עֹזְרֵי הַמִּלְחָמָה׃
englishText: Now these are they that came to David to Ziklag, while he was yet shut up because of Saul the son of Kish; and they were among the mighty men, his helpers in war.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: נֹשְׁקֵי קֶשֶׁת מַיְמִינִים וּמַשְׂמִאלִים בָּאֲבָנִים וּבַחִצִּים בַּקָּשֶׁת מֵאֲחֵי שָׁאוּל מִבִּנְיָמִן׃
englishText: They were armed with bows, and could use both the right hand and the left in slinging stones and in shooting arrows from the bow; they were of Saul’s brethren of Benjamin.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: הָרֹאשׁ אֲחִיעֶזֶר וְיוֹאָשׁ בְּנֵי הַשְּׁמָעָה הַגִּבְעָתִי ויזואל [וִיזִיאֵל] וָפֶלֶט בְּנֵי עַזְמָוֶת וּבְרָכָה וְיֵהוּא הָעֲנְּתֹתִי׃
englishText: The chief was Ahiezer, then Joash, the sons of Shemaah the Gibeathite; and Jeziel, and Pelet, the sons of Azmaveth; and Beracah, and Jehu the Anathothite;
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וְיִשְׁמַעְיָה הַגִּבְעוֹנִי גִּבּוֹר בַּשְּׁלֹשִׁים וְעַל־הַשְּׁלֹשִׁים׃
englishText: and Ishmaiah the Gibeonite, a mighty man among the thirty, and over the thirty;
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וְיִרְמְיָה וְיַחֲזִיאֵל וְיוֹחָנָן וְיוֹזָבָד הַגְּדֵרָתִי׃
englishText: and Jeremiah, and Jahaziel, and Johanan, and Jozabad the Gederathite;
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: אֶלְעוּזַי וִירִימוֹת וּבְעַלְיָה וּשְׁמַרְיָהוּ וּשְׁפַטְיָהוּ החריפי [הַחֲרוּפִי׃]
englishText: Eluzai, and Jerimoth, and Bealiah, and Shemariah, and Shephatiah the Hariphite;
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: אֶלְקָנָה וְיִשִּׁיָּהוּ וַעֲזַרְאֵל וְיוֹעֶזֶר וְיָשָׁבְעָם הַקָּרְחִים׃
englishText: Elkanah, and Isshiah, and Azarel, and Joezer, and Jashobeam, the Korahites;
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וְיוֹעֵאלָה וּזְבַדְיָה בְּנֵי יְרֹחָם מִן־הַגְּדוֹר׃
englishText: and Joelah, and Zebadiah, the sons of Jeroham of the troop.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וּמִן־הַגָּדִי נִבְדְּלוּ אֶל־דָּוִיד לַמְצַד מִדְבָּרָה גִּבֹּרֵי הַחַיִל אַנְשֵׁי צָבָא לַמִּלְחָמָה עֹרְכֵי צִנָּה וָרֹמַח וּפְנֵי אַרְיֵה פְּנֵיהֶם וְכִצְבָאיִם עַל־הֶהָרִים לְמַהֵר׃
englishText: And of the Gadites there separated themselves unto David to the stronghold in the wilderness, mighty men of valour, men trained for war, that could handle shield and spear; whose faces were like the faces of lions, and they were as swift as the roes upon the mountains;
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: עֵזֶר הָרֹאשׁ עֹבַדְיָה הַשֵּׁנִי אֱלִיאָב הַשְּׁלִשִׁי׃
englishText: Ezer the chief, Obadiah the second, Eliab the third;
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: מִשְׁמַנָּה הָרְבִיעִי יִרְמְיָה הַחֲמִשִׁי׃
englishText: Mashmannah the fourth, Jeremiah the fifth;
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: עַתַּי הַשִּׁשִּׁי אֱלִיאֵל הַשְּׁבִעִי׃
englishText: Attai the sixth, Eliel the seventh;
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: יוֹחָנָן הַשְּׁמִינִי אֶלְזָבָד הַתְּשִׁיעִי׃
englishText: Johanan the eighth, Elzabad the ninth;
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: יִרְמְיָהוּ הָעֲשִׂירִי מַכְבַּנַּי עַשְׁתֵּי עָשָׂר׃
englishText: Jeremiah the tenth, Machbannai the eleventh.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: אֵלֶּה מִבְּנֵי־גָד רָאשֵׁי הַצָּבָא אֶחָד לְמֵאָה הַקָּטָן וְהַגָּדוֹל לְאָלֶף׃
englishText: These of the sons of Gad were captains of the host; he that was least was equal to a hundred, and the greatest to a thousand.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: אֵלֶּה הֵם אֲשֶׁר עָבְרוּ אֶת־הַיַּרְדֵּן בַּחֹדֶשׁ הָרִאשׁוֹן וְהוּא מְמַלֵּא עַל־כָּל־גדיתיו [גְּדוֹתָיו] וַיַּבְרִיחוּ אֶת־כָּל־הָעֲמָקִים לַמִּזְרָח וְלַמַּעֲרָב׃
englishText: These are they that went over the Jordan in the first month, when it had overflown all its banks; and they put to flight all them of the valleys, both toward the east, and toward the west.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וַיָּבֹאוּ מִן־בְּנֵי בִנְיָמִן וִיהוּדָה עַד־לַמְצָד לְדָוִיד׃
englishText: And there came of the children of Benjamin and Judah to the stronghold unto David.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וַיֵּצֵא דָוִיד לִפְנֵיהֶם וַיַּעַן וַיֹּאמֶר לָהֶם אִם־לְשָׁלוֹם בָּאתֶם אֵלַי לְעָזְרֵנִי יִהְיֶה־לִּי עֲלֵיכֶם לֵבָב לְיָחַד וְאִם־לְרַמּוֹתַנִי לְצָרַי בְּלֹא חָמָס בְּכַפַּי יֵרֶא אֱלֹהֵי אֲבוֹתֵינוּ וְיוֹכַח׃
englishText: And David went out to meet them, and answered and said unto them: ‘If ye be come peaceably unto me to help me, my heart shall be knit unto you; but if ye be come to betray me to mine adversaries, seeing there is no wrong in my hands, the God of our fathers look thereon, and give judgment.’
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וְרוּחַ לָבְשָׁה אֶת־עֲמָשַׂי רֹאשׁ השלושים [הַשָּׁלִישִׁים] לְךָ דָוִיד וְעִמְּךָ בֶן־יִשַׁי שָׁלוֹם שָׁלוֹם לְךָ וְשָׁלוֹם לְעֹזְרֶךָ כִּי עֲזָרְךָ אֱלֹהֶיךָ וַיְקַבְּלֵם דָּוִיד וַיִּתְּנֵם בְּרָאשֵׁי הַגְּדוּד׃
englishText: Then the spirit clothed Amasai, who was chief of the captains: Thine are we, David, And on thy side, thou son of Jesse; Peace, peace be unto thee, And peace be to thy helpers; For thy God helpeth thee. Then David received them, and made them captains of the band.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וּמִמְּנַשֶּׁה נָפְלוּ עַל־דָּוִיד בְּבֹאוֹ עִם־פְּלִשְׁתִּים עַל־שָׁאוּל לַמִּלְחָמָה וְלֹא עֲזָרֻם כִּי בְעֵצָה שִׁלְּחֻהוּ סַרְנֵי פְלִשְׁתִּים לֵאמֹר בְּרָאשֵׁינוּ יִפּוֹל אֶל־אֲדֹנָיו שָׁאוּל׃
englishText: Of Manasseh also there fell away some to David, when he came with the Philistines against Saul to battle, but athey helped them not; for the lords of the Philistines upon advisement sent him away, saying: ‘He will fall away to his master Saul to the jeopardy of our heads.’
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: בְּלֶכְתּוֹ אֶל־צִיקְלַג נָפְלוּ עָלָיו מִמְּנַשֶּׁה עַדְנַח וְיוֹזָבָד וִידִיעֲאֵל וּמִיכָאֵל וְיוֹזָבָד וֶאֱלִיהוּא וְצִלְּתָי רָאשֵׁי הָאֲלָפִים אֲשֶׁר לִמְנַשֶּׁה׃
englishText: As he went to Ziklag, there fell to him of Manasseh, Adnah, and Jozabad, and Jediael, and Michael, and Jozabad, and Elihu, and Zillethai, captains of thousands that were of Manasseh.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וְהֵמָּה עָזְרוּ עִם־דָּוִיד עַל־הַגְּדוּד כִּי־גִבּוֹרֵי חַיִל כֻּלָּם וַיִּהְיוּ שָׂרִים בַּצָּבָא׃
englishText: And they helped David against the troop, for they were all mighty men of valour, and were
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: כִּי לְעֶת־יוֹם בְּיוֹם יָבֹאוּ עַל־דָּוִיד לְעָזְרוֹ עַד־לְמַחֲנֶה גָדוֹל כְּמַחֲנֵה אֱלֹהִים׃
englishText: For from day to day men came to David to help him, until there was a great host, like the host of God.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וְאֵלֶּה מִסְפְּרֵי רָאשֵׁי הֶחָלוּץ לַצָּבָא בָּאוּ עַל־דָּוִיד חֶבְרוֹנָה לְהָסֵב מַלְכוּת שָׁאוּל אֵלָיו כְּפִי יְהוָה׃
englishText: And these are the numbers of the heads of them that were armed for war, who came to David to Hebron, to turn the kingdom of Saul to him, according to the word of the LORD.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: בְּנֵי יְהוּדָה נֹשְׂאֵי צִנָּה וָרֹמַח שֵׁשֶׁת אֲלָפִים וּשְׁמוֹנֶה מֵאוֹת חֲלוּצֵי צָבָא׃
englishText: The children of Judah that bore shield and spear were six thousand and eight hundred, armed for war.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: מִן־בְּנֵי שִׁמְעוֹן גִּבּוֹרֵי חַיִל לַצָּבָא שִׁבְעַת אֲלָפִים וּמֵאָה׃
englishText: Of the children of Simeon, mighty men of valour for the war, seven thousand and one hundred.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: מִן־בְּנֵי הַלֵּוִי אַרְבַּעַת אֲלָפִים וְשֵׁשׁ מֵאוֹת׃
englishText: Of the children of Levi four thousand and six hundred.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וִיהוֹיָדָע הַנָּגִיד לְאַהֲרֹן וְעִמּוֹ שְׁלֹשֶׁת אֲלָפִים וּשְׁבַע מֵאוֹת׃
englishText: And Jehoiada was the leader of the house of Aaron, and with him were three thousand and seven hundred;
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וְצָדוֹק נַעַר גִּבּוֹר חָיִל וּבֵית־אָבִיו שָׂרִים עֶשְׂרִים וּשְׁנָיִם׃
englishText: and Zadok, a young man mighty of valour, and of his father’s house twenty and two captains.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וּמִן־בְּנֵי בִנְיָמִן אֲחֵי שָׁאוּל שְׁלֹשֶׁת אֲלָפִים וְעַד־הֵנָּה מַרְבִּיתָם שֹׁמְרִים מִשְׁמֶרֶת בֵּית שָׁאוּל׃
englishText: And of the children of Benjamin, the brethren of Saul, three thousand; for hitherto the greatest part of them had kept their allegiance to the house of Saul.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וּמִן־בְּנֵי אֶפְרַיִם עֶשְׂרִים אֶלֶף וּשְׁמוֹנֶה מֵאוֹת גִּבּוֹרֵי חַיִל אַנְשֵׁי שֵׁמוֹת לְבֵית אֲבוֹתָם׃
englishText: And of the children of Ephraim twenty thousand and eight hundred, mighty men of valour, famous men in their fathers’houses.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וּמֵחֲצִי מַטֵּה מְנַשֶּׁה שְׁמוֹנָה עָשָׂר אָלֶף אֲשֶׁר נִקְּבוּ בְּשֵׁמוֹת לָבוֹא לְהַמְלִיךְ אֶת־דָּוִיד׃
englishText: And of the half-tribe of Manasseh eighteen thousand, who were mentioned by name, to come and make David king.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וּמִבְּנֵי יִשָּׂשכָר יוֹדְעֵי בִינָה לַעִתִּים לָדַעַת מַה־יַּעֲשֶׂה יִשְׂרָאֵל רָאשֵׁיהֶם מָאתַיִם וְכָל־אֲחֵיהֶם עַל־פִּיהֶם׃
englishText: And of the children of Issachar, men that had understanding of the times, to know what Israel ought to do; the heads of them were two hundred; and all their brethren were at their commandment.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: מִזְּבֻלוּן יוֹצְאֵי צָבָא עֹרְכֵי מִלְחָמָה בְּכָל־כְּלֵי מִלְחָמָה חֲמִשִּׁים אָלֶף וְלַעֲדֹר בְּלֹא־לֵב וָלֵב׃
englishText: Of Zebulun, such as were able to go out in the host, that could set the battle in array, with all manner of instruments of war, fifty thousand; and that could order the battle array, and were not of double heart.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וּמִנַּפְתָּלִי שָׂרִים אָלֶף וְעִמָּהֶם בְּצִנָּה וַחֲנִית שְׁלֹשִׁים וְשִׁבְעָה אָלֶף׃
englishText: And of Naphtali a thousand captains, and with them with shield and spear thirty and seven thousand.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וּמִן־הַדָּנִי עֹרְכֵי מִלְחָמָה עֶשְׂרִים־וּשְׁמוֹנָה אֶלֶף וְשֵׁשׁ מֵאוֹת׃
englishText: And of the Danites that could set the battle in array, twenty and eight thousand and six hundred.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וּמֵאָשֵׁר יוֹצְאֵי צָבָא לַעֲרֹךְ מִלְחָמָה אַרְבָּעִים אָלֶף׃
englishText: And of Asher, such as were able to go out in the host, that could set the battle in array, forty thousand.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וּמֵעֵבֶר לַיַּרְדֵּן מִן־הָראוּבֵנִי וְהַגָּדִי וַחֲצִי שֵׁבֶט מְנַשֶּׁה בְּכֹל כְּלֵי צְבָא מִלְחָמָה מֵאָה וְעֶשְׂרִים אָלֶף׃
englishText: And on the other side of the Jordan, of the Reubenites, and the Gadites, and of the half-tribe of Manasseh, with all manner of instruments of war for the battle, a hundred and twenty thousand.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: כָּל־אֵלֶּה אַנְשֵׁי מִלְחָמָה עֹדְרֵי מַעֲרָכָה בְּלֵבָב שָׁלֵם בָּאוּ חֶבְרוֹנָה לְהַמְלִיךְ אֶת־דָּוִיד עַל־כָּל־יִשְׂרָאֵל וְגַם כָּל־שֵׁרִית יִשְׂרָאֵל לֵב אֶחָד לְהַמְלִיךְ אֶת־דָּוִיד׃
englishText: All these, being men of war, that could order the battle array, came with a whole heart to Hebron, to make David king over all Israel; and all the rest also of Israel were of one heart to make David king.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וַיִּהְיוּ־שָׁם עִם־דָּוִיד יָמִים שְׁלוֹשָׁה אֹכְלִים וְשׁוֹתִים כִּי־הֵכִינוּ לָהֶם אֲחֵיהֶם׃
englishText: And they were there with David three days, eating and drinking; for their brethren had made preparation for them.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וְגַם הַקְּרוֹבִים־אֲלֵיהֶם עַד־יִשָׂשכָר וּזְבֻלוּן וְנַפְתָּלִי מְבִיאִים לֶחֶם בַּחֲמוֹרִים וּבַגְּמַלִּים וּבַפְּרָדִים וּבַבָּקָר מַאֲכָל קֶמַח דְּבֵלִים וְצִמּוּקִים וְיַיִן־וְשֶׁמֶן וּבָקָר וְצֹאן לָרֹב כִּי שִׂמְחָה בְּיִשְׂרָאֵל׃
englishText: Moreover they that were nigh unto them, even as far as Issachar and Zebulun and Naphtali, brought bread on asses, and on camels, and on mules, and on oxen, victual of meal, cakes of figs, and clusters of raisins, and wine, and oil, and oxen, and sheep in abundance; for there was joy in Israel.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וַיִּוָּעַץ דָּוִיד עִם־שָׂרֵי הָאֲלָפִים וְהַמֵּאוֹת לְכָל־נָגִיד׃
englishText: And David consulted with the captains of thousands and of hundreds, even with every leader.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וַיֹּאמֶר דָּוִיד לְכֹל קְהַל יִשְׂרָאֵל אִם־עֲלֵיכֶם טוֹב וּמִן־יְהוָה אֱלֹהֵינוּ נִפְרְצָה נִשְׁלְחָה עַל־אַחֵינוּ הַנִּשְׁאָרִים בְּכֹל אַרְצוֹת יִשְׂרָאֵל וְעִמָּהֶם הַכֹּהֲנִים וְהַלְוִיִּם בְּעָרֵי מִגְרְשֵׁיהֶם וְיִקָּבְצוּ אֵלֵינוּ׃
englishText: And David said unto all the assembly of Israel: ‘If it seem good unto you, and if it be of the LORD our God, let us send abroad everywhere unto our brethren that are left in all the land of Israel, and with them to the priests and Levites that are in their cities that have open land about them, that they may gather themselves unto us;
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וְנָסֵבָּה אֶת־אֲרוֹן אֱלֹהֵינוּ אֵלֵינוּ כִּי־לֹא דְרַשְׁנֻהוּ בִּימֵי שָׁאוּל׃
englishText: and let us bring back the ark of our God to us; for we sought not unto it in the days of Saul.’
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וַיֹּאמְרוּ כָל־הַקָּהָל לַעֲשׂוֹת כֵּן כִּי־יָשַׁר הַדָּבָר בְּעֵינֵי כָל־הָעָם׃
englishText: And all the assembly said that they would do so; for the thing was right in the eyes of all the people.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וַיַּקְהֵל דָּוִיד אֶת־כָּל־יִשְׂרָאֵל מִן־שִׁיחוֹר מִצְרַיִם וְעַד־לְבוֹא חֲמָת לְהָבִיא אֶת־אֲרוֹן הָאֱלֹהִים מִקִּרְיַת יְעָרִים׃
englishText: So David assembled all Israel together, from Shihor the brook of Egypt even unto the entrance of Hamath, to bring the ark of God from Kiriath-jearim.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וַיַּעַל דָּוִיד וְכָל־יִשְׂרָאֵל בַּעֲלָתָה אֶל־קִרְיַת יְעָרִים אֲשֶׁר לִיהוּדָה לְהַעֲלוֹת מִשָּׁם אֵת אֲרוֹן הָאֱלֹהִים יְהוָה יוֹשֵׁב הַכְּרוּבִים אֲשֶׁר־נִקְרָא שֵׁם׃
englishText: And David went up, and all Israel, to Baalah, that is, to Kiriath-jearim, which belonged to Judah, to bring up from thence the ark of God, the LORD that sitteth upon the cherubim, whereon is called the Name.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וַיַּרְכִּיבוּ אֶת־אֲרוֹן הָאֱלֹהִים עַל־עֲגָלָה חֲדָשָׁה מִבֵּית אֲבִינָדָב וְעֻזָּא וְאַחְיוֹ נֹהֲגִים בָּעֲגָלָה׃
englishText: And they set the ark of God upon a new cart, [and brought it] out of the house of Abinadab; and Uzza and Ahio drove the cart.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וְדָוִיד וְכָל־יִשְׂרָאֵל מְשַׂחֲקִים לִפְנֵי הָאֱלֹהִים בְּכָל־עֹז וּבְשִׁירִים וּבְכִנֹּרוֹת וּבִנְבָלִים וּבְתֻפִּים וּבִמְצִלְתַּיִם וּבַחֲצֹצְרוֹת׃
englishText: And David and all Israel played before God with all their might; even with songs, and with harps, and with psalteries, and with timbrels, and with cymbals, and with trumpets.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וַיָּבֹאוּ עַד־גֹּרֶן כִּידֹן וַיִּשְׁלַח עֻזָּא אֶת־יָדוֹ לֶאֱחֹז אֶת־הָאָרוֹן כִּי שָׁמְטוּ הַבָּקָר׃
englishText: And when they came unto the threshing-floor of Chidon, Uzza put forth his hand to hold the ark; for the oxen stumbled.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וַיִּחַר־אַף יְהוָה בְּעֻזָּא וַיַּכֵּהוּ עַל אֲשֶׁר־שָׁלַח יָדוֹ עַל־הָאָרוֹן וַיָּמָת שָׁם לִפְנֵי אֱלֹהִים׃
englishText: And the anger of the LORD was kindled against Uzza, and He smote him, because he put forth his hand to the ark; and there he died before God.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וַיִּחַר לְדָוִיד כִּי־פָרַץ יְהוָה פֶּרֶץ בְּעֻזָּא וַיִּקְרָא לַמָּקוֹם הַהוּא פֶּרֶץ עֻזָּא עַד הַיּוֹם הַזֶּה׃
englishText: And David was displeased, because the LORD had broken forth upon Uzza; and that place was called Perez-uzza unto this day.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וַיִּירָא דָוִיד אֶת־הָאֱלֹהִים בַּיּוֹם הַהוּא לֵאמֹר הֵיךְ אָבִיא אֵלַי אֵת אֲרוֹן הָאֱלֹהִים׃
englishText: And David was afraid of God that day, saying: ‘How shall I bring the ark of God home to me?’
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וְלֹא־הֵסִיר דָּוִיד אֶת־הָאָרוֹן אֵלָיו אֶל־עִיר דָּוִיד וַיַּטֵּהוּ אֶל־בֵּית עֹבֵד־אֱדֹם הַגִּתִּי׃
englishText: So David removed not the ark unto him into the city of David, but carried it aside into the house of Obed-edom the Gittite.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וַיֵּשֶׁב אֲרוֹן הָאֱלֹהִים עִם־בֵּית עֹבֵד אֱדֹם בְּבֵיתוֹ שְׁלֹשָׁה חֳדָשִׁים וַיְבָרֶךְ יְהוָה אֶת־בֵּית עֹבֵד־אֱדֹם וְאֶת־כָּל־אֲשֶׁר־לוֹ׃
englishText: And the ark of God remained with the family of Obed-edom in his house three months; and the LORD blessed the house of Obed-edom, and all that he had.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וַיִּשְׁלַח חירם [חוּרָם] מֶלֶךְ־צֹר מַלְאָכִים אֶל־דָּוִיד וַעֲצֵי אֲרָזִים וְחָרָשֵׁי קִיר וְחָרָשֵׁי עֵצִים לִבְנוֹת לוֹ בָּיִת׃
englishText: And Huram king of Tyre sent messengers to David, and cedar-trees, and masons, and carpenters, to build him a house.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וַיֵּדַע דָּוִיד כִּי־הֱכִינוֹ יְהוָה לְמֶלֶךְ עַל־יִשְׂרָאֵל כִּי־נִשֵּׂאת לְמַעְלָה מַלְכוּתוֹ בַּעֲבוּר עַמּוֹ יִשְׂרָאֵל׃
englishText: And David perceived that the LORD had established him king over Israel, for his kingdom was exalted exceedingly, for His people Israel’s sake.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וַיִּקַּח דָּוִיד עוֹד נָשִׁים בִּירוּשָׁלִָם וַיּוֹלֶד דָּוִיד עוֹד בָּנִים וּבָנוֹת׃
englishText: And David took more wives at Jerusalem; and David begot more sons and daughters.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וְאֵלֶּה שְׁמוֹת הַיְלוּדִים אֲשֶׁר הָיוּ־לוֹ בִּירוּשָׁלִָם שַׁמּוּעַ וְשׁוֹבָב נָתָן וּשְׁלֹמֹה׃
englishText: And these are the names of the children whom he had in Jerusalem: Shammua, and Shobab, Nathan, and Solomon;
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וְיִבְחָר וֶאֱלִישׁוּעַ וְאֶלְפָּלֶט׃
englishText: and Ibhar, and Elishua, and Elpelet;
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וְנֹגַהּ וְנֶפֶג וְיָפִיעַ׃
englishText: and Nogah, and Nepheg, and Japhia;
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וֶאֱלִישָׁמָע וּבְעֶלְיָדָע וֶאֱלִיפָלֶט׃
englishText: and Elishama, and Beeliada, and Eliphelet.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וַיִּשְׁמְעוּ פְלִשְׁתִּים כִּי־נִמְשַׁח דָּוִיד לְמֶלֶךְ עַל־כָּל־יִשְׂרָאֵל וַיַּעֲלוּ כָל־פְּלִשְׁתִּים לְבַקֵּשׁ אֶת־דָּוִיד וַיִּשְׁמַע דָּוִיד וַיֵּצֵא לִפְנֵיהֶם׃
englishText: And when the Philistines heard that David was anointed king over all Israel, all the Philistines went up to seek David; and David heard of it, and went out to meet them.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וּפְלִשְׁתִּים בָּאוּ וַיִּפְשְׁטוּ בְּעֵמֶק רְפָאִים׃
englishText: Now the Philistines had come and made a raid in the valley of Rephaim.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וַיִּשְׁאַל דָּוִיד בֵּאלֹהִים לֵאמֹר הַאֶעֱלֶה עַל־פלשתיים [פְּלִשְׁתִּים] וּנְתַתָּם בְּיָדִי וַיֹּאמֶר לוֹ יְהוָה עֲלֵה וּנְתַתִּים בְּיָדֶךָ׃
englishText: And David inquired of God, saying: ‘Shall I go up against the Philistines? and wilt Thou deliver them into my hand?’ And the LORD said unto him: ‘Go up; for I will deliver them into thy hand.’
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וַיַּעֲלוּ בְּבַעַל־פְּרָצִים וַיַּכֵּם שָׁם דָּוִיד וַיֹּאמֶר דָּוִיד פָּרַץ הָאֱלֹהִים אֶת־אוֹיְבַי בְּיָדִי כְּפֶרֶץ מָיִם עַל־כֵּן קָרְאוּ שֵׁם־הַמָּקוֹם הַהוּא בַּעַל פְּרָצִים׃
englishText: So they came up to Baal-perazim, and David smote them there; and David said: ‘God hath broken mine enemies by my hand, like the breach of waters.’ Therefore they called the name of that place Baal-perazim.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וַיַּעַזְבוּ־שָׁם אֶת־אֱלֹהֵיהֶם וַיֹּאמֶר דָּוִיד וַיִּשָּׂרְפוּ בָּאֵשׁ׃
englishText: And they left their gods there; and David gave commandment, and they were burned with fire.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וַיֹּסִיפוּ עוֹד פְּלִשְׁתִּים וַיִּפְשְׁטוּ בָּעֵמֶק׃
englishText: And the Philistines yet again made a raid in the valley.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וַיִּשְׁאַל עוֹד דָּוִיד בֵּאלֹהִים וַיֹּאמֶר לוֹ הָאֱלֹהִים לֹא תַעֲלֶה אַחֲרֵיהֶם הָסֵב מֵעֲלֵיהֶם וּבָאתָ לָהֶם מִמּוּל הַבְּכָאִים׃
englishText: And David inquired again of God; and God said unto him: ‘Thou shalt not go up after them; turn away from them, and come upon them over against the mulberry-trees.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וִיהִי כְּשָׁמְעֲךָ אֶת־קוֹל הַצְּעָדָה בְּרָאשֵׁי הַבְּכָאִים אָז תֵּצֵא בַמִּלְחָמָה כִּי־יָצָא הָאֱלֹהִים לְפָנֶיךָ לְהַכּוֹת אֶת־מַחֲנֵה פְלִשְׁתִּים׃
englishText: And it shall be, when thou hearest the sound of marching in the tops of the mulberry-trees, that then thou shalt go out to battle; for God is gone out before thee to smite the host of the Philistines.’
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וַיַּעַשׂ דָּוִיד כַּאֲשֶׁר צִוָּהוּ הָאֱלֹהִים וַיַּכּוּ אֶת־מַחֲנֵה פְלִשְׁתִּים מִגִּבְעוֹן וְעַד־גָּזְרָה׃
englishText: And David did as God commanded him; and they smote the host of the Philistines from Gibeon even to Gezer.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וַיֵּצֵא שֵׁם־דָּוִיד בְּכָל־הָאֲרָצוֹת וַיהוָה נָתַן אֶת־פַּחְדּוֹ עַל־כָּל־הַגּוֹיִם׃
englishText: And the fame of David went out into all lands; and the LORD brought the fear of him upon all nations.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וַיַּעַשׂ־לוֹ בָתִּים בְּעִיר דָּוִיד וַיָּכֶן מָקוֹם לַאֲרוֹן הָאֱלֹהִים וַיֶּט־לוֹ אֹהֶל׃
englishText: And [David] made him houses in the city of David; and he prepared a place for the ark of God, and pitched for it a tent.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: אָז אָמַר דָּוִיד לֹא לָשֵׂאת אֶת־אֲרוֹן הָאֱלֹהִים כִּי אִם־הַלְוִיִּם כִּי־בָם בָּחַר יְהוָה לָשֵׂאת אֶת־אֲרוֹן יְהוָה וּלְשָׁרְתוֹ עַד־עוֹלָם׃
englishText: Then David said: ‘None ought to carry the ark of God but the Levites; for them hath the LORD chosen to carry the ark of the LORD, and to minister unto Him for ever.’
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וַיַּקְהֵל דָּוִיד אֶת־כָּל־יִשְׂרָאֵל אֶל־יְרוּשָׁלִָם לְהַעֲלוֹת אֶת־אֲרוֹן יְהוָה אֶל־מְקוֹמוֹ אֲשֶׁר־הֵכִין לוֹ׃
englishText: And David assembled all Israel at Jerusalem, to bring up the ark of the LORD unto its place, which he had prepared for it.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וַיֶּאֱסֹף דָּוִיד אֶת־בְּנֵי אַהֲרֹן וְאֶת־הַלְוִיִּם׃
englishText: And David gathered together the sons of Aaron, and the Levites;
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: לִבְנֵי קְהָת אוּרִיאֵל הַשָּׂר וְאֶחָיו מֵאָה וְעֶשְׂרִים׃
englishText: of the sons of Kohath: Uriel the chief, and his brethren a hundred and twenty;
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: לִבְנֵי מְרָרִי עֲשָׂיָה הַשָּׂר וְאֶחָיו מָאתַיִם וְעֶשְׂרִים׃
englishText: of the sons of Merari: Asaiah the chief, and his brethren two hundred and twenty;
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: לִבְנֵי גֵּרְשׁוֹם יוֹאֵל הַשָּׂר וְאֶחָיו מֵאָה וּשְׁלֹשִׁים׃
englishText: of the sons of Gershom: Joel the chief, and his brethren a hundred and thirty;
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: לִבְנֵי אֱלִיצָפָן שְׁמַעְיָה הַשָּׂר וְאֶחָיו מָאתָיִם׃
englishText: of the sons of Elizaphan: Shemaiah the chief, and his brethren two hundred;
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: לִבְנֵי חֶבְרוֹן אֱלִיאֵל הַשָּׂר וְאֶחָיו שְׁמוֹנִים׃
englishText: of the sons of Hebron: Eliel the chief, and his brethren fourscore;
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: לִבְנֵי עֻזִּיאֵל עַמִּינָדָב הַשָּׂר וְאֶחָיו מֵאָה וּשְׁנֵים עָשָׂר׃
englishText: of the sons of Uzziel: Amminadab the chief, and his brethren a hundred and twelve.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וַיִּקְרָא דָוִיד לְצָדוֹק וּלְאֶבְיָתָר הַכֹּהֲנִים וְלַלְוִיִּם לְאוּרִיאֵל עֲשָׂיָה וְיוֹאֵל שְׁמַעְיָה וֶאֱלִיאֵל וְעַמִּינָדָב׃
englishText: And David called for Zadok and Abiathar the priests, and for the Levites, for Uriel, Asaiah, and Joel, Shemaiah, and Eliel, and Amminadab,
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וַיֹּאמֶר לָהֶם אַתֶּם רָאשֵׁי הָאָבוֹת לַלְוִיִּם הִתְקַדְּשׁוּ אַתֶּם וַאֲחֵיכֶם וְהַעֲלִיתֶם אֵת אֲרוֹן יְהוָה אֱלֹהֵי יִשְׂרָאֵל אֶל־הֲכִינוֹתִי לוֹ׃
englishText: and said unto them: ‘Ye are the heads of the fathers’houses of the Levites; sanctify yourselves, both ye and your brethren, that ye may bring up the ark of the LORD, the God of Israel, unto the place that I have prepared for it.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: כִּי לְמַבָּרִאשׁוֹנָה לֹא אַתֶּם פָּרַץ יְהוָה אֱלֹהֵינוּ בָּנוּ כִּי־לֹא דְרַשְׁנֻהוּ כַּמִּשְׁפָּט׃
englishText: For because ye [bore it] not at the first, the LORD our God made a breach upon us, for that we sought Him not according to the ordinance.’
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וַיִּתְקַדְּשׁוּ הַכֹּהֲנִים וְהַלְוִיִּם לְהַעֲלוֹת אֶת־אֲרוֹן יְהוָה אֱלֹהֵי יִשְׂרָאֵל׃
englishText: So the priests and the Levites sanctified themselves to bring up the ark of the LORD, the God of Israel.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וַיִּשְׂאוּ בְנֵי־הַלְוִיִּם אֵת אֲרוֹן הָאֱלֹהִים כַּאֲשֶׁר צִוָּה מֹשֶׁה כִּדְבַר יְהוָה בִּכְתֵפָם בַּמֹּטוֹת עֲלֵיהֶם׃
englishText: And the children of the Levites bore the ark of God upon their shoulders with the bars thereon, as Moses commanded according to the word of the LORD.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וַיֹּאמֶר דָּוִיד לְשָׂרֵי הַלְוִיִּם לְהַעֲמִיד אֶת־אֲחֵיהֶם הַמְשֹׁרְרִים בִּכְלֵי־שִׁיר נְבָלִים וְכִנֹּרוֹת וּמְצִלְתָּיִם מַשְׁמִיעִים לְהָרִים־בְּקוֹל לְשִׂמְחָה׃
englishText: And David spoke to the chief of the Levites to appoint their brethren the singers, with instruments of music, psalteries and harps and cymbals, sounding aloud and lifting up the voice with joy.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וַיַּעֲמִידוּ הַלְוִיִּם אֵת הֵימָן בֶּן־יוֹאֵל וּמִן־אֶחָיו אָסָף בֶּן־בֶּרֶכְיָהוּ וּמִן־בְּנֵי מְרָרִי אֲחֵיהֶם אֵיתָן בֶּן־קוּשָׁיָהוּ׃
englishText: So the Levites appointed Heman the son of Joel; and of his brethren, Asaph the son of Berechiah; and of the sons of Merari their brethren, Ethan the son of Kushaiah;
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וְעִמָּהֶם אֲחֵיהֶם הַמִּשְׁנִים זְכַרְיָהוּ בֵּן וְיַעֲזִיאֵל וּשְׁמִירָמוֹת וִיחִיאֵל וְעֻנִּי אֱלִיאָב וּבְנָיָהוּ וּמַעֲשֵׂיָהוּ וּמַתִּתְיָהוּ וֶאֱלִיפְלֵהוּ וּמִקְנֵיָהוּ וְעֹבֵד אֱדֹם וִיעִיאֵל הַשֹּׁעֲרִים׃
englishText: and with them their brethren of the second degree, Zechariah, Ben, and Jaaziel, and Shemiramoth, and Jehiel, and Unni, Eliab, and Benaiah, and Maaseiah, and Mattithiah, and Eliphalehu, and Mikneiah, and Obed-edom, and Jeiel, the doorkeepers.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וְהַמְשֹׁרְרִים הֵימָן אָסָף וְאֵיתָן בִּמְצִלְתַּיִם נְחֹשֶׁת לְהַשְׁמִיעַ׃
englishText: So the singers, Heman, Asaph, and Ethan [, were appointed], with cymbals of brass to sound aloud;
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וּזְכַרְיָה וַעֲזִיאֵל וּשְׁמִירָמוֹת וִיחִיאֵל וְעֻנִּי וֶאֱלִיאָב וּמַעֲשֵׂיָהוּ וּבְנָיָהוּ בִּנְבָלִים עַל־עֲלָמוֹת׃
englishText: and Zechariah, and Aziel, and Shemiramoth, and Jehiel, and Unni, and Eliab, and Maaseiah, and Benaiah, with psalteries set to Alamoth;
